H001.description_zh: 馬匹年齡（年），由出生日期推算至賽日。香港賽事以 3-5 歲為主流，年齡是成熟度曲線的粗略代理——三歲馬於短途（≤1200m）接近高峰，四至五歲於中長途漸入佳境。七歲後體能下滑，且老馬常受年齡-評分曲線壓制，須留意整體 cohort 背景而非單看數值。
H001.description_en: Horse age in years at race day, the most basic conditioning variable in serious racing logits since Bolton-Chapman 1986. It proxies physical maturity: three-year-olds peak in sprints (≤1200m) while four- and five-year-olds dominate middle and long trips. Past seven, performance fades, and the HK handicap curve quietly penalises older horses, so age is best read against the field's age mix.
H001.notes_zh:
技術層面：年齡是 multinomial logit 條件特徵之一，捕捉成熟度曲線。3 歲馬於短途 (≤1200m) 表現接近高峰，4-5 歲於中長途 (≥1600m) 漸入高峰。香港賽事年齡上限約 11 歲，老馬普遍受年齡-評分曲線壓制。
通俗層面：就像運動員一樣，馬匹有黃金期。三歲馬還年輕貪玩，七歲後體能下滑，最強的多是四到五歲。
H001.notes_en:
Technical: age is a baseline conditioning variable in every serious racing logit since Bolton-Chapman 1986 [B1]. Three-year-olds peak in sprints (≤1200m); four- and five-year-olds dominate middle and long distances. The HK rating system implicitly penalises older horses through the handicap curve.
Layman: like athletes, horses have a prime — usually 4 to 5 years old. Three-year-olds are physically immature; once past 7, performance falls off.

H002.description_zh: 閹馬二元標記。閹割消除睪固酮波動，性情更穩、賽前少焦躁、表現更一致，因此約 85% 的香港出賽馬為閹馬。在繁殖價值低、馬廄競爭激烈的港地環境下，閹割是預設選擇，純種公馬反而罕見。
H002.description_en: Binary flag for geldings. Castration removes testosterone-driven temperament swings, steadying a horse and improving race-to-race consistency, which is why roughly 85% of HK runners are gelded. With little stallion-quality breeding demand and fierce stable competition, gelding is the HK default and an entire colt is the exception.
H002.notes_zh:
技術層面：性別 → 行為穩定性 → 表現一致性。閹割消除睪固酮波動，減少賽前焦躁。HK 因競爭環境、馬廄空間有限，繁殖價值低，閹割比例極高。
通俗層面：就是公馬被去勢，脾氣較好、跑得專心。香港跑馬大部分都是閹馬，純種公馬反而少見。
H002.notes_en:
Technical: gelding eliminates testosterone-driven temperament variance, improving consistency from race to race. HK has limited stallion-quality breeding demand and very high stable competition, so gelding is the default.
Layman: a gelding is a castrated male horse. They're calmer and easier to train, which is why nearly all HK runners are geldings.

H003.description_zh: 馬匹性別類別：雄駒（colt）、雌駒（filly）、騸馬（gelding）、雌馬（mare），編碼為 0-3。性別關聯行為穩定性與體能曲線，是基礎條件特徵；雌馬於部分高班次（如 Group 1）享有約 3 lb 性別讓磅，需與負磅特徵一併解讀。
H003.description_en: Horse sex encoded 0-3: colt, filly, gelding, mare. Sex ties into temperament stability and physical profile, serving as a baseline conditioning variable; mares receive a sex allowance (around 3 lb) in certain top-class events, so this feature should be read alongside carried-weight features rather than in isolation.

H004.description_zh: 馬匹毛色，如棗（bay）、栗（chestnut）、灰（grey）等編碼。本身屬弱訊號，幾乎不直接影響表現，但與部分血統基因標記相關，可作為父系/家族的間接代理。模型中權重低，主要用於捕捉殘餘的譜系結構。
H004.description_en: Coat colour (bay, chestnut, grey, etc.) encoded as a category. On its own it is a weak signal with little direct bearing on finishing position, but it correlates loosely with certain pedigree/genetic markers and can act as an indirect proxy for sire or family. Expect low model weight — it mainly mops up residual lineage structure.

H005.description_zh: 出生月份，用作同齡組（cohort）內的相對成熟度代理。北半球三歲馬中，1-2 月出生者較 6-7 月出生者多出數月發育時間，平均勝率約高 8%。此特徵依賴外部出生資料，目前未接入 HKJC 來源、暫不計算，僅列於目錄以示完整。
H005.description_en: Birth month as a within-cohort maturity proxy: among northern-hemisphere three-year-olds, those foaled in Jan-Feb carry several extra months of development over Jun-Jul foals and historically win about 8% more often. The signal relies on external foaling data not wired into HKJC sources, so it is currently inactive and listed for catalogue completeness only.

H006.description_zh: 出生半球（北/南）。澳洲、紐西蘭出生馬的官方馬齡按南半球曆計，與香港賽季存在「年齡漂移」，使其有效成熟度與北半球同齡馬不一致。此特徵需外部出生地/曆制資料，目前未接入 HKJC 來源、暫不計算，僅列於目錄以示完整。
H006.description_en: Birth hemisphere (north/south). Australian- and NZ-bred horses are aged on the southern calendar, creating an "age drift" against the HK season so their effective maturity differs from northern-bred peers of the same nominal age. Computing it needs external foaling-origin data not connected to HKJC feeds, so it is currently inactive and present for completeness.

H007.description_zh: HKJC 於宣布出賽時公布的「Horse Wt. (Declaration)」原始磅值，即馬匹體重。它框定馬匹的體格基準，是判讀體重變動與狀態的錨點：過輕可能代表瘦弱或操之過急，過重則可能未練足。應與體重變動（H008）一同解讀。
H007.description_en: The raw declared body weight (HKJC "Horse Wt. (Declaration)", in lb) recorded when the horse is declared to run. It anchors the horse's physical scale and is the reference point for reading condition: unusually light can signal a horse run down or rushed back, heavy can signal underdone fitness. Most informative when paired with the body-weight delta (H008).

H008.description_zh: 本次宣告體重相對上次的變動（HKJC「Wt.+/- (vs Declaration)」）。體重是少數可觀測的狀態訊號，±10 lb 以上通常具顯著意義：大幅增重可能代表停賽復出後未練足，明顯減重可能反映操練得宜或過度消耗。方向與幅度需結合休賽期與近績一併判斷。
H008.description_en: Change in declared body weight versus the previous run (HKJC "Wt.+/- (vs Declaration)"). Weight is one of the few directly observable condition cues, and swings beyond about ±10 lb are meaningful: a big gain can flag an underdone return from a layoff, a sharp drop can mean either sharpened fitness or a horse run down. Read the sign and size together with rest days and recent form.

H009.description_zh: HKJC 公布的 0-145 殘障評分，每場賽後由評磅員按表現調整，決定馬匹須負的重量並框定其可入的班次（如 Class 3 需 81-100 分）。評分趨勢（升/跌）比靜態數值更具預測力——上升往往預示狀態回勇，急跌則暗示馬匹正在掉班。
H009.description_en: The HKJC 0-145 handicap mark the stewards re-rate after every run; it fixes the weight a horse must carry and bounds the class of races it can enter (e.g. Class 3 requires 81-100). The slope of the rating over recent starts carries more signal than its level — a rising mark often pre-empts an in-form win, while a plummeting one flags a horse losing its class.
H009.notes_zh:
技術層面：評分是 HK 等級制 (Class 1-5) 的入閘門檻：例如 Class 3 要求 81-100 分。評分趨勢 (rating slope) 比靜態值更有預測力 — 上升趨勢通常配合改進中。
通俗層面：類似於圍棋的段位。分高就要扛更多重量、跑更高班次，分低就降班跑更輕負擔。看評分升降比看絕對值更有用，能反映馬匹的當下狀態。
H009.notes_en:
Technical: rating gates entry into class bands (e.g. Class 3 requires 81-100). The rating's slope over recent starts carries more signal than the static level — a rising trend often pre-empts an in-form win.
Layman: think of it as a handicap golf score. Higher rating = heavier weight + tougher class; lower = drops down to easier races. Watch the direction of change more than the number itself.

H010.description_zh: 馬匹生涯累計出賽場數。它本身是經驗與耐磨度的代理，但更關鍵的是作為其他統計量（勝率、入位率等）的樣本量基礎——出賽愈多，貝氏收縮愈不主導，估計愈接近真實能力。場數過少時，所有比率特徵都應視為高度不確定。
H010.description_en: Total career starts. It proxies experience and durability, but its main role is as the sample size behind every other rate statistic (win, place, ROI): the more starts, the less the Bayesian prior dominates and the closer estimates sit to true ability. With very few starts, all of a horse's rate features should be treated as highly uncertain.

H011.description_zh: 父系（sire）身分標籤，並可附帶全球速度評級，用於捕捉遺傳的速度-耐力傾向及場地偏好（如軟地、草地適性）。父系是血統訊號的核心代理，但本特徵依賴外部血統資料庫，目前未接入 HKJC 來源、暫不計算，僅列於目錄以示完整。
H011.description_en: Sire identity (hashed), optionally carrying a global speed rating, used to capture inherited speed-stamina leanings and surface/going preferences. Sire is the backbone of pedigree signal, but this feature depends on an external bloodstock database not wired into HKJC feeds, so it is currently inactive and listed for catalogue completeness only.

H012.description_zh: 母父（dam sire）身分標籤。母系一方的血統常對耐力、軟地適性與成熟速度有獨特影響，是父系之外的補充遺傳訊號。本特徵同樣依賴外部血統資料庫，目前未接入 HKJC 來源、暫不計算，僅列於目錄以示完整。
H012.description_en: Dam-sire identity (hashed). The maternal line often contributes distinct stamina, soft-ground aptitude and maturation traits, complementing the sire signal as a second axis of inherited ability. Like the sire feature, it needs an external pedigree database not connected to HKJC sources, so it is currently inactive and present only for completeness.

H013.description_zh: 血統速耐指數（Dosage Index）：依血統將祖先歸入 Brilliant/Intermediate/Classic/Solid/Professional 五段，計算速度對耐力的比值，用以預測馬匹的最佳距離傾向。需 BloodHorse/Pedigree Online 等外部血統資料，HKJC 範圍外，目前停用，僅列於目錄以示其原理。
H013.description_en: Dosage Index: a pedigree-derived ratio that sorts chef-de-race ancestors into five aptitude bands (Brilliant/Intermediate/Classic/Solid/Professional) to quantify a horse's speed-versus-stamina balance and likely best distance. It requires external bloodstock data (BloodHorse/Pedigree Online) outside HKJC scope, so it is disabled and shown only to document what it would contribute.

H014.description_zh: 引進來源國（AUS / NZL / GB / IRE / FR / USA / RSA 等）編碼。HKJC 馬匹全數進口，來源地關聯訓練背景、典型距離傾向與場地適性，例如澳紐馬多速度型、歐洲馬偏耐力型。可作為血統與適性的粗略代理，與距離、場地特徵交互時最有意義。
H014.description_en: Country of import (AUS, NZL, GBR, IRE, FR, USA, RSA, etc.) encoded as a category. Every HK horse is imported, and origin proxies training background, typical distance leanings and surface aptitude — Australasian imports skew toward speed, European ones toward stamina. It is a coarse pedigree/aptitude stand-in, most useful when interacted with distance and going features.

H015.description_zh: 馬匹生涯勝率，採用貝氏 Beta(α,β) 先驗收縮，把出賽少的馬拉回全場平均（約 8.3%），避免小樣本方差過大——例如兩戰一勝不會被當成 50% 勝率。後驗 =（勝場 + α）/（出賽 + α + β），出賽愈多估計愈靠近實際能力。
H015.description_en: Bayesian-shrunk career win rate. A Beta(α,β) prior (about 5 pseudo-runs at the field-mean ~8.3%) pulls thinly-raced horses toward average via (wins+α)/(runs+α+β), so a horse with one win in two starts isn't treated as a 50% chance. As starts accumulate the prior fades and the estimate converges on true ability — the standard hierarchical-Bayesian fix for sparse entities.
H015.notes_zh:
技術層面：Beta(5, 5×0.083/0.917) ≈ Beta(5, 55) 先驗。Posterior = (wins + α) / (runs + α + β)。Hierarchical Bayesian 文獻 [B25] 推薦此法處理少樣本馬匹。
通俗層面：就是把「打得少又剛好贏一次」的馬，拉回到正常水平再評估。新馬贏一場不代表牠厲害，可能只是運氣；先驗收縮讓我們不被小樣本騙到。
H015.notes_en:
Technical: a Beta(α, β) prior with prior pseudo-runs ≈ 5 and prior win-rate ≈ 0.083 is added to the empirical (wins + α) / (runs + α + β). This is the standard Hierarchical Bayesian recommendation [B25] for thinly-observed entities.
Layman: prevents the model from thinking a horse that won 1-of-2 starts is a 50% favourite. A handful of races isn't enough evidence; we pull thin-data horses toward the average until they prove themselves.

H016.description_zh: 騎師生涯勝率，同樣採貝氏收縮。HKJC 頂級騎師出賽逾 5,000 場，先驗幾乎不影響其估計（Purton、Bowman、Moreira、Ferraris 約 18-22%）；但對見習騎師，先驗在累積足夠往績前主導估計。騎師是模型中最強的單一因子之一。
H016.description_en: Bayesian-shrunk jockey win rate. Top HK jockeys ride 5,000+ times so the prior barely moves their number (Purton, Bowman, Moreira, Ferraris sit at 18-22%), while for apprentices the prior dominates until a track record builds. Jockey quality is one of the strongest single features in any serious model and the market re-prices instantly when an elite name takes the ride.
H016.notes_zh:
技術層面：頂級騎師 (Purton、Bowman、Moreira、Ferraris) 平均勝率約 18-22%。優秀騎師對勝率貢獻顯著且穩定，是 syndicate 重要因子 [B14]。
通俗層面：好騎師像好球員，能讓平凡的馬發揮出色。Purton、Bowman 騎的馬通常會壓更短賠率；新騎師則是個未知數，要看夠多場才信得過。
H016.notes_en:
Technical: top-tier HK jockeys (Purton, Bowman, Moreira, Ferraris) sit at 18-22% career win rate — a striking gap above the mean. Jockey contribution is one of the strongest single features in any syndicate's model [B14].
Layman: a great jockey can squeeze a win out of an ordinary horse. When Purton or Bowman gets the ride, the market reflects it immediately.

H017.description_zh: 練馬師生涯勝率，採用貝氏收縮處理樣本量差異。練馬師決定操練、配置與出賽時機，是穩定的場外能力訊號；強廄勝率持續高於平均，新晉或低量練馬師則被先驗拉向均值，直至累積足夠出賽方顯真章。
H017.description_en: Bayesian-shrunk trainer win rate. The trainer governs conditioning, placement and timing, making this a stable off-track ability signal; strong yards run persistently above average while low-volume or new trainers are pulled toward the field mean by the prior until enough runners accumulate to prove their strike rate.

H018.description_zh: 騎師×練馬師配對勝率，附貝氏先驗收縮。某些騎練組合長期合作、默契與信任度高，其聯手勝率常高於各自單獨水準，反映「靚馬配靚騎」的安排訊號。配對樣本通常偏小，先驗收縮尤為重要，以免被偶發佳績誤導。
H018.description_en: Win rate for the specific jockey-trainer combination, with a Bayesian prior. Some pairings work together regularly and a trainer's choice to book a given rider can itself signal a fancied runner, so their joint strike rate often exceeds either party's solo rate. Pair samples are usually thin, making the shrinkage prior essential to avoid being fooled by a hot streak.

H019.description_zh: 騎師×馬匹配對勝率，附先驗收縮。同一騎師重複策騎同一匹馬，會更熟悉其脾性、起步與發力時機，往績佳的固定組合是正面訊號。惟單一馬-騎組合出賽極少，樣本稀薄，估計高度依賴先驗，須謹慎解讀。
H019.description_en: Win rate for the specific jockey-horse combination, with a shrinkage prior. A rider who has partnered the same horse before knows its quirks, gate behaviour and when to ask for effort, so a proven pairing is a positive cue. Because any single horse-jockey combo races very few times, the sample is sparse and the estimate leans heavily on the prior — interpret with care.

H020.description_zh: 入位率，即完成於第 2 名以內（HK 位置 Q 的核心）的比率。相較勝率，入位率樣本更密、方差更低，能更穩定地反映馬匹的下盤實力與一致性，對識別「常爭先卻欠臨門一腳」的好馬尤其有用。亦採收縮處理小樣本。
H020.description_en: Place rate — the share of starts finishing in the top two, the core of HK place (Q) betting. Because placings occur more often than wins, this rate is denser and lower-variance than win rate, giving a steadier read on a horse's underlying competitiveness and consistency, and it is especially good at spotting genuine types that run well without quite winning.

H021.description_zh: 三甲率，即完成於前三名的比率，與香港三重彩（trio/tierce）等彩池直接相關。它是比勝率更寬、更穩定的競爭力指標，捕捉馬匹「跑得近」的傾向；對偏好以位置或組合投注的策略尤具參考價值。小樣本同樣經收縮校正。
H021.description_en: Top-3 finish rate, directly relevant to HK trio/tierce pools. As a broader, more stable competitiveness measure than win rate, it captures a horse's tendency to run prominently rather than just win, which is valuable for place- and combination-based staking. Like the other rates it is shrinkage-corrected so sparse records aren't over-read.

H022.description_zh: 每 $2 注碼的平均淨報酬（Brisnet 標準呈現），即歷史上盲注該實體所得的回本。它把勝率與賠率合併成單一獲利度量：勝率高卻長期低賠的熱門 ROI 可能仍為負，冷門偶中則可能拉高 ROI。是衡量「市場是否低估」的盈虧導向訊號。
H022.description_en: Average net return per $2 staked, presented Brisnet-style — what blindly backing this entity would have returned historically. It fuses win rate and price into one profitability number: a heavily-backed favourite can post negative ROI despite winning often, while an occasional longshot strike can lift it. A bottom-line gauge of whether the market has under-priced the runner.

H023.description_zh: Actual/Expected：實際勝率 ÷ 賠率隱含勝率（A/E = win_rate / mean(1/odds)）。>1.00 表示歷來跑贏市場預期，<1.00 表示被市場高估。它是冷熱門偏差的客觀量度——熱門常約 0.95-0.98，極端冷門約 0.5-0.7。A/E 高於 1 即「靚位」(value) 訊號。
H023.description_en: Actual / Expected: realised win rate divided by the market's implied win rate (A/E = win_rate / mean(1/odds)). Above 1.00 means the entity has beaten the market historically; below 1.00 means the market over-rates it. It objectively measures favourite-longshot bias — favourites typically run 0.95-0.98, extreme longshots 0.5-0.7 — so any A/E above 1 flags where the value lives.
H023.notes_zh:
技術層面：A/E = win_rate / mean(1/odds)。是 longshot bias 與 favourite bias 的客觀量度。Snowberg-Wolfers [B48] 文獻顯示，favourites 通常 A/E ≈ 0.95-0.98，極端 longshots A/E ≈ 0.5-0.7。
通俗層面：簡單來說：你預測得準不準？如果這匹馬的賠率長期低估了牠的能力，A/E 就大於 1，這就是「靚位」(value bet) 的訊號。
H023.notes_en:
Technical: A/E = win_rate / mean(1/odds). It quantifies favourite-longshot bias [B48]: heavy favourites typically run A/E ≈ 0.95-0.98 (slightly over-bet), extreme longshots A/E ≈ 0.5-0.7 (heavily over-bet). A/E > 1.0 anywhere is a market-beating signal.
Layman: a way to ask 'does this horse's price match its actual chances?' If A/E is above 1, the bookies have been under-pricing it — that's where the value lives.

H024.description_zh: Impact Value：某屬性分組的勝率 ÷ 全體基準勝率。IV = 1.0 為中性，>1.0 表示具該屬性（騎師、跑法、閘號等）的馬勝率高於平均。它衡量的是原始頻率優勢，與以市場隱含為分母的 A/E 不同；業界以 IV ≥ 1.5 為強訊號門檻。
H024.description_en: Impact Value: a group's win rate divided by the field-average win rate. IV = 1.0 is neutral; IV > 1.0 means horses sharing that attribute (a jockey, running style, draw, etc.) win above average. Unlike A/E, which divides by the market-implied rate, IV gauges raw frequency rather than market efficiency — the industry treats IV ≥ 1.5 as a strong signal.
H024.notes_zh:
技術層面：分組可為任何 categorical 變量 (騎師、練馬師、跑法、閘號)。IV ≠ A/E：IV 用基準勝率為分母，A/E 用市場隱含為分母。Equibase 使用 IV ≥ 1.5 為強訊號標準 [B22]。
通俗層面：用「對比平均」來看每個因素的影響力。例如某騎師 IV=1.8 表示牠騎的馬比平均高出 80% 勝率，這是隱性優勢。
H024.notes_en:
Technical: IV = group_win_rate / field_baseline_win_rate. Distinct from A/E (which divides by market-implied): IV gauges raw frequency, A/E gauges market efficiency. Industry rule of thumb: IV ≥ 1.5 marks a strong signal [B22].
Layman: tells you whether some attribute (a jockey, a draw, a running style) wins more than average. IV of 2.0 means twice the normal rate — a real edge worth pricing in.

H025.description_zh: 騎師於跑馬地（Happy Valley）的勝率。跑馬地是緊湊、彎多的市區夜賽場，閘位、走位與節奏掌控的要求與沙田迥異，騎師對此場地的熟練度差異顯著。場地專屬勝率能捕捉這種「跑馬地專家」效應，是場地交互的關鍵特徵。
H025.description_en: Jockey win rate specifically at Happy Valley. HV is a tight, turning city-track run under lights, where draw, positioning and tempo judgement matter very differently than at Sha Tin, so riders vary markedly in how well they handle it. This venue-specific rate captures the "Happy Valley specialist" effect and feeds the model's jockey-by-track interactions.

H026.description_zh: 騎師於沙田（Sha Tin）的勝率。沙田是寬闊的標準賽道，直路長、容納大型賽事，戰術空間與跑馬地不同。將騎師在沙田與跑馬地的勝率分開，可避免把兩場地的能力混為一談，並凸顯各騎師的場地偏好與專長。
H026.description_en: Jockey win rate specifically at Sha Tin. ST is a wide, galloping championship circuit with a long straight that suits different tactics than Happy Valley. Splitting a rider's Sha Tin record from their HV record prevents the two venues' abilities from being averaged together and surfaces each jockey's track-specific strengths and preferences.

H027.description_zh: 練馬師於跑馬地（Happy Valley）的勝率。部分馬廄擅長為市區夜賽場備戰與部署，掌握其緊湊賽道的特性。場地專屬的練馬師勝率能分離出這種專長，補足整體勝率所掩蓋的場地差異，並支撐練馬師×場地的交互訊號。
H027.description_en: Trainer win rate specifically at Happy Valley. Some yards are notably adept at preparing and placing horses for the tight city night-track, exploiting its particular characteristics. This venue-specific trainer rate isolates that aptitude, complementing the overall strike rate that would otherwise mask track differences and supporting trainer-by-venue interactions.

H028.description_zh: 三巨頭騎師標記：策騎者為 Purton、Bowman、Moreira 或 Ferraris 時取值，屬香港頂尖騎師層級。其名一上馬牌，先驗勝率即在其他特徵之前被上調（約 +5-8 個百分點），市場亦隨即縮賠。常作為與班次、距離的強交互特徵使用。
H028.description_en: Top-tier jockey flag: a binary marker set when the ride goes to Z Purton, H Bowman, J Moreira or L Ferraris — HK's elite. Their name on the card lifts the prior win probability (roughly +5-8 points) before any other feature is read, and the market shortens the price accordingly. It is used as a strong interaction term with class and distance in the LambdaMART space.
H028.notes_zh:
技術層面：base-rate boost ≈ +5-8% 勝率對相同條件下其他騎師。在 walk-forward 訓練中通常作為強烈交互特徵 (jockey × class、jockey × distance)。
通俗層面：這四位騎師在港賽是「金字塔頂端」，光是他們騎，賠率就會自動縮短。模型必須把這種隱性優勢納入考量。
H028.notes_en:
Technical: base-rate boost of about +5-8 percentage points over the equivalent non-top-three rider. Used as a strong interaction term with class and distance in the LambdaMART feature space.
Layman: these four jockeys are HK's elite. Their presence alone shortens the price — the market sees the name on the card and reacts before reading anything else.

H029.description_zh: 距離適性：馬匹於本距離分桶（如 1000-1200m、1400-1600m）的歷史勝率，衡量牠是否真正勝任當前賽程。馬匹常有明確的最佳距離區間，轉戰陌生距離會折損表現。樣本依分桶切割後易偏小，需結合血統傾向與收縮謹慎解讀。
H029.description_en: Distance adaptation: the horse's historical win rate within the current distance bucket (e.g. 1000-1200m, 1400-1600m), measuring whether it genuinely handles today's trip. Horses tend to have a clear optimal range and lose form when stretched or shortened off it. Bucketed samples thin out quickly, so read this alongside pedigree distance leanings and shrinkage.

H030.description_zh: 比較馬匹於草地與全天候沙地（AWT）的勝率／表現差距，量化其對賽道物料的偏好。香港賽事分跑馬地、沙田草地及沙田 AWT，部分馬匹明顯偏吃某一物料，轉跑陌生場地時表現驟降。樣本少時以收縮先驗向群體平均回拉，避免少數場次造成過度推斷。
H030.description_en: Measures a horse's win-rate / performance gap between turf and the all-weather (AWT) surface, quantifying which footing it actually handles. HK racing splits across Happy Valley and Sha Tin turf plus the Sha Tin AWT, and many horses are clearly surface-specialists whose form collapses when switched to an unfamiliar strip. With thin samples the split is shrunk toward the population mean so a handful of runs can't over-state a preference.

H031.description_zh: 本意為以 Brisnet 數據統計某父系（sire）後代在當前距離的投資回報率，用以借「血統×距離」傾向推斷馬匹的距離適配。香港並無 Brisnet 數據源，此欄僅為特徵目錄完整性而保留，目前未接線、不參與計算。若有數據，可在馬匹自身樣本不足時，以父系後代群體的距離表現作為先驗補強。
H031.description_en: Intended to use Brisnet data to compute a sire's progeny ROI at the current trip, borrowing a 'bloodline × distance' tendency to infer how well a horse should handle the distance. No Brisnet feed exists for HK, so this card is kept only for catalogue completeness and is currently inactive / out-of-scope and does not compute. Were it wired up, it would supply a sire-level distance prior to back-fill horses with too few starts of their own.

H032.description_zh: 本意為衡量某父系後代在草地對沙地的表現差距，將「血統的物料偏好」用作個別馬匹的場地適性先驗。此版本依賴非香港的血統表現數據，目前未接線、不參與計算，僅為目錄完整性保留。若啟用，可在馬匹首跑或自身場地樣本太少時，以父系傾向預估其轉場地後的勝算。
H032.description_en: Intended to capture a sire's progeny turf-vs-dirt performance edge, using bloodline footing-preference as a surface prior for the individual horse. This version leans on non-HK pedigree-performance data, is currently inactive / out-of-scope and does not compute — retained only for catalogue completeness. If enabled it would let the model predict a horse's surface switch from the sire's tendency when the horse itself has few or no relevant starts.

H033.description_zh: 以馬齡分桶（如 2、3、4、5+ 歲）結合當前距離，統計各組別在該距離的勝率，捕捉「成熟度×距離」的交互。幼馬通常較吃短途速度、年長馬於中長途耐力更穩，故同一距離下不同齡組的勝算曲線各異。此欄屬類別 3 已列項的交互保留槽，樣本稀疏時向齡組平均收縮。
H033.description_en: Buckets horses by age (e.g. 2, 3, 4, 5+) and crosses it with the current trip, reporting each band's win-rate at that distance to capture a 'maturity × distance' interaction. Younger horses typically lean on raw sprint speed while older ones hold staying form better, so the win curve over a given trip differs by age band. Listed as the cross-slot retained under category 3; sparse cells shrink toward the age-band mean.

H034.description_zh: 衡量馬匹對左轉與右轉賽道的偏好——香港跑馬地為右轉、沙田為左轉，部分馬匹明顯只在某一轉向跑出佳績。此欄需要逐圈轉向的細分成績數據，目前未接線、不參與計算，僅為目錄完整性保留。若啟用，可解釋同程馬匹在兩地表現落差中，純由轉向造成的那部分。
H034.description_en: Captures a horse's preference for left-handed versus right-handed tracks — Happy Valley runs right-handed and Sha Tin left-handed, and some horses clearly only fire turning one way. The feature needs per-turn-direction form data that isn't wired up, so it's currently inactive / out-of-scope and does not compute, kept only for catalogue completeness. If enabled it would isolate the slice of a horse's venue-to-venue form gap that is purely about turning direction.

H035.description_zh: 統計馬匹在當前月份（對應香港 9 月至翌年 7 月賽季）的勝率，捕捉季節性狀態與場地差異。夏秋偏濕熱、草地較軟，春冬轉乾快，部分馬匹的去濕能力與體感週期使其在特定月份明顯較佳。屬點對點計算、不偷看未來成績；早季樣本少時向長期平均收縮。
H035.description_en: Reports a horse's win-rate in the current calendar month across the HK season (September to July), capturing seasonal form and going effects. Summer-autumn meetings run humid on softer turf while spring-winter firms up, and some horses' wet-handling and physical cycle leave them visibly sharper in particular months. Computed point-in-time with no look-ahead, and shrunk toward the long-run mean when early-season samples are thin.

H036.description_zh: 依香港班次體系（Class 1-5 及 Group／Listed 賽事）分項統計馬匹在當前班次的勝率，衡量其是否處於合適級別。班次即對手強弱的代理，馬匹自低班升上高班常見勝率塌陷，反之降班則易見起色。各班次樣本不均，少跑的班別向馬匹整體勝率收縮以穩定估計。
H036.description_en: Splits a horse's win-rate by HK class tier (Class 1-5 plus Group / Listed races) and reads it at the current level, gauging whether the horse is racing in its right grade. Class proxies the strength of opposition, so a horse stepping up often sees its strike-rate collapse while a drop in class frequently sparks a revival. Because per-class samples are uneven, lightly-raced tiers are shrunk toward the horse's overall win-rate to stabilise the estimate.

H037.description_zh: 本意為由分段時間估算馬匹起閘約首 100-200m 相對全場的平均位次，量化其出閘搶位能力。此欄依賴逐段（sectional）位次數據，目前未接線、不參與計算，僅為目錄完整性保留。若啟用，可預示馬匹能否搶得前置／內欄好位，對閘號劣勢與配速類型有重要交互作用。
H037.description_en: Intended to estimate, from sectional times, a horse's average position over the first ~100-200m out of the gate relative to the field, quantifying early gate speed. It depends on per-sectional positional data that isn't wired up, so it's currently inactive / out-of-scope and does not compute, retained only for catalogue completeness. If enabled it would forecast whether a horse can grab early, rail-saving position — a key interaction with poor draws and running-style type.

H038.description_zh: 復原代理：以「距上場日數 × 該場負擔權重」衡量馬匹的休養是否到位（頭馬與位置馬負擔權重較重）。歇太短體能透支、歇太長則手感生疏，兩端皆不利，故此值用以同時標記過勞與久休未復的馬匹。按間隔分桶（≤28 短歇、29-60 理想、60-90 邊緣、>90 久歇懲罰），並與練馬師帶歇馬勝率交互判讀。
H038.description_en: Recovery proxy: days since the last start multiplied by an effort weight from that run (winners and placers carry heavier weight), gauging whether the horse has freshened up properly. Too short a gap leaves it tired and too long leaves it rusty, so both extremes hurt and the feature flags over-raced and under-recovered runners alike. Bucketed by gap (≤28 short-back, 29-60 ideal, 60-90 marginal, >90 long-layoff penalty) and read alongside a trainer's record with returners.
H038.notes_zh:
技術層面：分桶 28 (短歇)、29-60 (理想)、60-90 (邊緣)、>90 (久歇懲罰)。配合 trainer_returner_wr 識別「練馬師擅長帶歇馬出賽」者。
通俗層面：跑完一場大賽要休多久才能再戰？休太短體能透支、休太長手感生疏。看這個欄就知道牠是不是適合的時機。
H038.notes_en:
Technical: bucketed by gap (≤28 short-back, 29-60 ideal, 60-90 marginal, >90 long-layoff penalty). Pairs with trainer_returner_wr to spot stables that handle returners well.
Layman: how long since the horse last raced — too short and it's tired, too long and it's rusty. The model catches both extremes.

H039.description_zh: 練馬師近期勝率的移動平均，衡量馬房當下的「手感熱度」。馬房狀態具明顯群聚性——疫病、狀態、出賽計時得當時，同廄馬匹會一同轉強，故近期熱度對個別馬匹勝算有正向加成。屬滾動、點對點計算、不偷看未來；近期出賽少時向練馬師長期勝率收縮。
H039.description_en: A rolling moving-average of a trainer's recent win-rate, measuring how hot the stable is running right now. Stable form clusters strongly — when health, condition and timing line up the whole yard fires together — so recent heat lifts the win chance of any individual runner from that barn. Computed as a point-in-time rolling figure with no look-ahead, and shrunk toward the trainer's long-run strike-rate when recent starts are few.

H040.description_zh: 衡量練馬師近期勝率低於其長期水平的偏差，捕捉馬房「冷浪」期。與熱度對稱：馬房可能因病疫、狀態低潮或調教節奏失準而集體失準，此時旗下馬匹勝算應下調。屬點對點計算、不偷看未來；以與長期基準的差值表達，避免單純低勝率把弱廄誤判為冷廄。
H040.description_en: Measures how far a trainer's recent win-rate sits below their long-run level, catching a stable in a cold spell. Symmetric to the hot-streak feature: a yard can collectively go off the boil through sickness, a form trough or mistimed work, and its runners should be marked down while that lasts. Computed point-in-time with no look-ahead and expressed as a deviation from the trainer's own baseline, so a structurally weak yard isn't mislabelled as merely cold.

H041.description_zh: 計算練馬師在 Class 1-5 各班次的投資回報率（ROI），找出其擅長的級別區間。有些練馬師專於高班精英馬、有些則擅長操作低班讓賽馬，班次強項反映其調教與配置取向。以 ROI 而非單純勝率衡量可納入賠率價值；各班次樣本不均時向練馬師整體向收縮。
H041.description_en: Computes a trainer's return-on-investment (ROI) within each HK class tier (Class 1-5) to surface the grades they handle best. Some yards specialise in elite top-class horses while others excel at placing and prepping low-grade handicappers, and this class edge reflects their training and entry bias. Using ROI rather than raw win-rate folds in price value, and uneven per-class samples are shrunk toward the trainer's overall figure.

H042.description_zh: 按距離區段計算練馬師的投資回報率（ROI），辨別其為短途專家抑或中長途好手。練馬師在配速、調教與選賽上各有距離取向，旗下馬匹於其拿手距離通常更有賠率價值。以 ROI 衡量可捕捉被市場低估的角度；各區段樣本不足時向練馬師整體 ROI 收縮。
H042.description_en: Computes a trainer's ROI by distance band, separating the sprint specialists from the middle-distance and staying handlers. Yards carry distance biases in how they condition, target and ride their horses, so runners tend to offer more price value at the trip the trainer does best over. ROI framing captures angles the market underrates, and thin bands are shrunk toward the trainer's overall ROI.

H043.description_zh: 捕捉練馬師於賽季早／中／末段的狀態週期，反映其「養兵」與「催谷」節奏。有些馬房開季即火、有些慣於季中發力或末段衝刺爭榜，這種季內 form cycle 對旗下馬匹的當下勝算有系統性影響。屬點對點計算、不偷看未來；以季段分桶並向練馬師整體勝率收縮以穩定估計。
H043.description_en: Captures a trainer's form cycle across the early / mid / late phases of the season, reflecting how a yard paces itself through the campaign. Some stables come out firing, others build through the middle or surge late chasing the premiership, and this within-season rhythm systematically shifts their runners' current win chances. Computed point-in-time with no look-ahead, bucketed by season phase and shrunk toward the trainer's overall strike-rate.

H044.description_zh: 統計練馬師以首戰馬（debutants）出賽的勝率，衡量其調教新馬、令其首跑即有競爭力的能力。香港首戰馬無往績可依，練馬師的「出新馬」往績便成為關鍵先驗——擅長備新馬的馬房，旗下處子馬常不容小覷。樣本通常偏少，故向練馬師整體勝率收縮以免過度推斷。
H044.description_en: Reports a trainer's win-rate with debutants, gauging how well they prepare a first-timer to be competitive on debut. With no past form to lean on, a HK newcomer's chance hinges heavily on the yard's debut record as a prior — stables good at readying first-timers turn out runners that can't be dismissed. These samples are usually small, so the figure is shrunk toward the trainer's overall strike-rate to avoid over-reading it.

H045.description_zh: 衡量練馬師對歇賽 45-180 日後復出馬的投資回報率（ROI），即其「帶歇馬重上」的本領。長歇後馬匹體能與比賽節奏未必到位，能否一擊即中極依賴練馬師的復出操作，故此角度對久休復賽風險的判讀很關鍵。以 ROI 捕捉賠率價值，並在樣本不足時向練馬師整體向收縮。
H045.description_en: Measures a trainer's ROI with horses returning from a 45-180 day layoff — their knack for getting a freshened-up runner to fire first time back. After a long break a horse's fitness and race-rhythm may not be there, so whether it can win off the bench leans heavily on how the yard manages returners. ROI framing captures the price value, and the figure is shrunk toward the trainer's overall level when samples are thin.

H046.description_zh: 衡量練馬師在跑馬地與沙田兩地勝率的差距，捕捉其場地取向。兩個馬場圈型、彎度與草地特性迥異，加上跑馬地夜賽的緊湊節奏，使部分馬房明顯偏吃某一場地。此差值用以調整旗下馬匹於當日場地的勝算；各地樣本不足時向練馬師整體勝率收縮。
H046.description_en: Measures the gap between a trainer's win-rates at Happy Valley versus Sha Tin, capturing a venue bias. The two courses differ sharply in circumference, curvature and turf character — plus the tight rhythm of Happy Valley's night meetings — so some yards clearly do better at one or the other. The split adjusts a runner's chance at the day's venue, shrunk toward the trainer's overall strike-rate when per-venue samples are thin.

H047.description_zh: 練馬師近 30 日的入閘出賽次數，作為馬房活躍度與「狀態脈搏」的代理。出賽量上升常見於馬房狀態回勇、計時得當之時，反映其有信心派馬出擊；過低則可能暗示低潮或休整。屬滾動、點對點計算、不偷看未來，常與練馬師熱度等特徵聯合判讀。
H047.description_en: Counts a trainer's runners over the last 30 days as a proxy for stable activity and form pulse. A rising count of starts often coincides with a yard in good heart and well-timed campaigns, signalling confidence to send horses out, while a low count can hint at a trough or a deliberate spell. Computed as a rolling point-in-time figure with no look-ahead, typically read alongside the trainer hot-streak features.

H048.description_zh: 練馬師旗下現役馬匹數量（HKJC 設約 60 匹上限）。馬房規模關乎資源、馬源質素與選賽彈性——大馬房可挑場出擊、攤分風險，小馬房則往往更倚重單一明星馬。此值多作背景與交互特徵，與練馬師勝率、熱度等聯合解讀，而非單獨的勝負信號。
H048.description_en: The number of active horses a trainer has in work (HKJC caps stables around 60). Stable size speaks to resources, quality of stock and entry flexibility — a big yard can cherry-pick races and spread its risk, while a small one often leans on a single standout. It mostly serves as a context and interaction feature, read together with a trainer's win-rate and hot-streak signals rather than as a standalone win indicator.

H049.description_zh: 本意為統計練馬師施加裝備改動（如加眼罩 blinkers、改 gear）時的角度投資回報率（ROI），衡量其「動裝備即見效」的本領。此欄需要逐場裝備變動的明細數據，目前未接線、不參與計算，僅為目錄完整性保留。若啟用，可標記練馬師有意出招、市場常低估的場次。
H049.description_en: Intended to measure a trainer's angle ROI when they apply a gear change (e.g. first-time blinkers or other gear), gauging their knack for making equipment tweaks pay. It needs per-race gear-change detail that isn't wired up, so it's currently inactive / out-of-scope and does not compute, retained only for catalogue completeness. If enabled it would flag the races where a yard is clearly making a move that the market tends to underrate.

H050.description_zh: 閘號（barrier draw）：起跑位置編號 1-N，1 號最內。內閘省彎少跑路、更快搶抵首彎，外閘則較難取位、易受罰，於跑馬地及沙田短途尤其明顯。其邊際效應與賽道、距離強烈交互：跑馬地短途內閘優勢顯著，沙田 1600m 草地近乎中性，AWT 1200m 反而外閘較佳。
H050.description_en: The starting gate barrier number, 1-N with 1 innermost. Inner draws save ground and reach the first turn sooner, while outer draws struggle for position and can be punished, most visibly at Happy Valley and over short Sha Tin trips. The marginal effect interacts strongly with track and distance: HV sprints reward inner draws sharply, Sha Tin 1600m turf is roughly draw-neutral, and the AWT 1200m course actually favours wider draws.
H050.notes_zh:
技術層面：track × distance × draw 三維交互效應強烈：跑馬地 1200m 內閘優勢顯著，沙田 1600m 草地內外幾乎中性，AWT 1200m 外閘反而較佳。
通俗層面：閘位就像短跑選手的水道，內側少跑幾步路。但有些賽道、有些距離反而外閘更好，所以要看綜合條件。
H050.notes_en:
Technical: the marginal effect interacts strongly with track and distance. Happy Valley sprints reward inner draws sharply; Sha Tin 1600m is roughly draw-neutral on turf; the AWT 1200m course actually favours wider draws.
Layman: like lanes on a running track — the inside lane is shortest but only matters on certain courses. The model handles the per-course quirks.

H051.description_zh: 內閘標記：閘號 ≤3 時為 1，否則為 0。將「最內側起步」抽成一個粗略二元信號，凸顯省彎、易搶內欄好位的優勢。屬閘號的非線性補充項，與賽道×距離閘號偏差交互——多數短途及跑馬地賽事內閘為利，但個別場地距離未必成立。
H051.description_en: Inner-draw flag: 1 when the barrier is ≤3, else 0. It distils the 'started right on the inside' edge into a coarse binary, capturing the ground-saving, rail-grabbing advantage of the lowest gates. A non-linear complement to the raw draw, it interacts with the track×distance draw bias — inner is an edge in most sprints and at Happy Valley, but not necessarily on every course-and-distance.

H052.description_zh: 外閘標記：閘號落在全場後 1/3 時為 1，否則為 0。捕捉「起步偏外」的劣勢——多數情況下須多走外疊或搶位耗力。屬閘號的非線性二元補充，須與賽道×距離閘號偏差交互判讀，因少數場地距離（如 AWT 短途）外閘反而有利。
H052.description_en: Outer-draw flag: 1 when the barrier falls in the last third of the field, else 0. It captures the disadvantage of starting wide — usually having to travel extra ground or burn energy crossing for position. A non-linear binary complement to the raw draw, it must be read against the track×distance draw bias, since a handful of course-and-distances (e.g. AWT sprints) actually reward wide gates.

H053.description_zh: 大外閘標記：閘號落在全場最末 2 個位置時為 1，否則為 0。比一般外閘標記更極端，專捕「拉到最闊」的嚴重劣勢，這類馬常被迫長時間外疊或大幅退守。屬閘號的尾端非線性項，與距首彎距離、賽道偏差交互——首彎太近時大外閘受罰最重。
H053.description_en: Wide-draw flag: 1 when the barrier is in the outermost two of the field, else 0. More extreme than the general outer flag, it isolates the severe penalty of being drawn right off the track, where a horse is often forced wide for long stretches or has to drop right back. A tail non-linear draw term that interacts with run-up length and track bias — the widest gates are hit hardest when the first turn comes up quickly.

H054.description_zh: 賽道×距離閘號偏差：以查找表給出每個賽道、距離組合的閘號優劣，例如跑馬地 1000m 內閘強、沙田 1600m 近乎中性。把閘號的真實邊際效應依場地距離校正，避免「內閘恆優」的過度簡化。此為閘號相關特徵的核心交互項，多項閘號標記皆須據此判讀。
H054.description_en: Track×distance draw bias: a lookup table giving the draw advantage for each course-and-distance — e.g. inner is strong at Happy Valley 1000m but roughly neutral at Sha Tin 1600m. It calibrates the true marginal effect of the gate to the specific venue and trip, correcting the over-simple 'inner is always better' view. This is the core interaction term for the draw family, against which the various draw flags should be read.

H055.description_zh: 由起點至第一彎的直路長度（run-up）。run-up 越短，外閘馬越無時間切入內側便要入彎，被逼外疊或退後，受罰越重；跑馬地起點距首彎短，正是外閘吃虧的典型。此值放大或抵銷閘號劣勢，是閘號與賽道幾何之間的關鍵調節項。
H055.description_en: The straight run-up length from the start to the first turn. The shorter the run-up, the less time a wide-drawn horse has to cross toward the rail before the bend, so it gets forced wide or shuffled back and the draw penalty bites harder — Happy Valley's short approach to its first turn is the classic case. This length amplifies or offsets the gate penalty, serving as the key modifier between draw and track geometry.

H056.description_zh: 本意為由起後約 200m 的分段（sectional）位次，估算馬匹相對全場的起閘搶位速度。此欄依賴逐段位次數據，目前未接線、不參與計算，僅為目錄完整性保留。若啟用，可衡量馬匹能否化解外閘劣勢、搶得前置或內欄好位，與閘號及配速類型有重要交互。
H056.description_en: Intended to estimate a horse's gate break speed relative to the field from its sectional position at around the first 200m. It depends on per-sectional positional data that isn't wired up, so it's currently inactive / out-of-scope and does not compute, retained only for catalogue completeness. If enabled it would gauge whether a horse can overcome a wide draw to secure early or rail position — a key interaction with the draw and running-style type.

H057.description_zh: 賽道彎度，以圈長代理：沙田草地圈長較大、彎度較緩，跑馬地約 1450m 圈長則彎急而緊。彎度影響取位難度、外疊損耗與配速優勢——緊彎場地更利搶前佔內欄，闊彎則給後上馬更多兜路空間。屬賽道幾何的背景特徵，與閘號、跑法及距首彎距離聯合解讀。
H057.description_en: Track curvature, proxied by circumference: Sha Tin's turf is a large, sweeping circuit while Happy Valley's ~1450m loop is tight and sharply turning. Curvature drives how hard it is to get position, the cost of racing wide and the running-style edge — tight tracks favour leaders grabbing the rail, while sweeping ones give closers more room to circle. A track-geometry context feature, read together with the draw, run-style and run-up length.

H058.description_zh: 草地內外欄（rail position）：A／B／C／C+3 等配置，HKJC 每周移動臨時跑道內欄以分散草皮磨損。A 為標準內側位置，B／C／C+3 則外移數米讓被踐踏的內側草皮復原。當日 rail 位置改變內側三分一草地的快慢與用法，並與配速優勢交互——內欄外移、領放馬於較軟地面轉弱時，後上馬可受惠。
H058.description_en: Rail position: the A / B / C / C+3 configuration of the temporary running rail, which HKJC moves weekly to spread wear across the turf. 'A' is the standard inner setting, while B / C / C+3 push the rail out a few metres to let trampled inside grass recover. The day's rail changes how the inner third of the track plays and interacts with running-style edge — when the rail is moved out and front-runners tire on softer ground, closers can gain.
H058.notes_zh:
技術層面：A rail = 標準位置；B/C/C+3 偏外，讓未被踐踏的內側草皮復原。當日 rail 影響配速優勢 (closer 對 leader) 和閘號殘差。
通俗層面：球場會定期更換球門位，馬場也會挪動跑道內欄的位置，讓草皮恢復。位置會影響哪邊草較硬、哪種跑法佔便宜。
H058.notes_en:
Technical: 'A' = standard inner rail; B/C/C+3 push the running rail outward by a few metres to let trampled turf recover. Rail position interacts with running-style edge — closers can gain when the rail is moved out and the leaders tire on softer ground.
Layman: the inside fence of the track is moveable. Shifting it changes which patches of grass are fresh — which favours different running styles on different days.

H059.description_zh: 全天候跑道（AWT）的閘號偏差訊號，取原始檔位再按 AWT 跑道特性調整。沙田泥地的彎位與配速結構與草地不同，內外檔的優劣會隨之改變，故與草地閘號分開建模。屬點對點賽道偏差，須避免將草地經驗直接套用於泥地。
H059.description_en: Draw-bias signal specific to the all-weather (AWT) dirt track, taken from the raw barrier number and scaled to the AWT surface profile. Because the dirt track's bends and pace structure differ from turf, the inner-vs-outer advantage shifts and is modelled separately from turf draw effects. Track-specific by design, so turf draw priors should not be carried straight over to dirt.

H060.description_zh: 閘號與跑法的交互增益：將內檔配前領、外檔配後上等有利組合標記出來。內檔搶前可省去走外疊浪的距離損耗，外檔則更適合留後再衝，兩者錯配往往拖累位置與走線。此特徵捕捉單看閘號或單看跑法都漏掉的協同效應，在短途與彎多賽道尤為關鍵。
H060.description_en: An interaction booster that flags favourable barrier-by-running-style combinations, e.g. inner draw with front-running, outer draw with a closing style. An inner gate lets a leader save ground on the rail, while an outer gate suits a horse settling back to swoop late; mismatches cost position and force wide trips. It captures synergy that neither draw nor style alone reveals, and matters most over short trips and turning tracks.

H061.description_zh: 騎師連同鞍具須負的總重量（磅），由評磅員依馬匹評分加班次讓磅及性別／見習／馬齡調整而定。每多扛約 1 磅大致拖慢 0.04-0.06 秒/1000m，邊際成本在長途賽放大，是 Benter 體系的核心讓磅變數。讓磅制刻意給強馬加重以拉平實力，理論上令全場機會均等。
H061.description_en: The total weight (jockey plus saddle) the horse must carry in pounds, set by the handicapper from the horse's rating with class, sex, apprentice and age adjustments layered on. Each extra pound costs roughly 0.04-0.06 seconds per 1000m, with the marginal cost growing over longer trips, and it is one of Benter's core handicapping variables. The handicap system deliberately loads the better horses to level the field — in theory equalising every runner's chance at the line.
H061.notes_zh:
技術層面：每 1 lb 增減約對應 0.04-0.06 秒/1000m 的時間差。weight × distance 交互在長途賽 (≥1800m) 顯著放大。Benter 1994 [B1] 將 weight 列為核心 weight variable 之一。
通俗層面：扛得越重就跑得越慢，是直觀的物理。handicap 賽用負磅讓強馬讓弱馬，理論上每匹馬都有同等機會贏。
H061.notes_en:
Technical: every extra pound costs roughly 0.04-0.06 seconds per 1000m, with the marginal cost growing in long-distance races. Benter 1994 [B1] lists carried weight as one of the core handicapping variables.
Layman: heavier means slower. The handicap system loads weight onto the better horses to even out the field — in theory every runner should have an equal chance at the line.

H062.description_zh: 見習騎師可申領的減磅優惠（磅），直接從馬匹須負總磅中扣除。減磅讓策騎經驗較淺的見習生有競爭力，實際負磅變輕對速度有正面作用，但須與見習生本身的失誤風險權衡。模型視之為對名義負磅的修正項，而非單純利好。
H062.description_en: The pound allowance an apprentice jockey can claim, deducted straight from the weight the horse actually carries. The claim keeps less-experienced riders competitive and the lighter effective burden helps the clock, but it must be weighed against the apprentice's higher error and inexperience risk. The model treats it as a correction to nominal weight rather than an unqualified positive.

H063.description_zh: 本場負磅相對上一場的變化量（Δ）。讓磅制下負磅上調通常意味馬匹近績轉佳被評磅員加碼，亦反映其可能被市場高估；負磅下調則多隨評分回落而來。趨勢方向比絕對數值更具訊號，須以賽前申報為準避免前視偏差。
H063.description_en: The change in carried weight versus the horse's previous start (delta). Under the handicap, a weight rise usually means the assessor has marked the horse up after improving form — and may flag it as market-overrated — while a weight drop tends to follow a falling rating. The direction of the shift carries more signal than its raw size, and it is read point-in-time from the declared weights to avoid look-ahead.

H064.description_zh: HKJC 申報的馬匹體重（Horse Wt. at Declaration）原始值，與 H007 同源。這是馬匹本身的磅重，反映體格與當前狀態，並非須負的讓磅。絕對值意義有限，主要作為體重變動與體型基線的輸入；須以申報時點讀取以保持無前視。
H064.description_en: The raw declared body weight of the horse (HKJC 'Horse Wt. at Declaration'), duplicating H007. This is the animal's own mass, reflecting its physique and current condition, and is distinct from the handicap weight it must carry. The absolute figure means little on its own and serves mainly as the baseline for body-weight movement and frame size, read as of declaration to stay point-in-time.

H065.description_zh: HKJC 公布的馬匹體重變動（Wt.+/- vs Declaration），即本場較對上紀錄的增減磅，與 H008 同源。約 ±10 磅以上屬顯著訊號：驟增可能是失操或浮腫，驟減或反映過度操練或健康問題，適度增重則常見於壯齡進步。須結合馬齡與近況解讀，方向與幅度同樣重要。
H065.description_en: The body-weight change HKJC publishes (Wt.+/- vs declaration), the pound gain or loss versus the prior record, duplicating H008. Swings beyond about ±10 lb are meaningful: a sharp gain can mean a let-down or bloat, a sharp drop may signal over-work or a health issue, while a moderate gain often reflects a maturing, strengthening horse. Both direction and magnitude matter and are best read alongside age and recent form.

H066.description_zh: 騎師本人的體重，獨立於馬匹須負的總負磅。此項需要 HKJC 賽程未常規公布的逐場騎師磅重資料，目前資料源未接通（_nan_stub），列入目錄僅為完整性。若啟用，可把實際騎手體重與鞍具配重分離，更準確估算讓磅中真正壓在馬背上的部分，現階段不參與計算。
H066.description_en: The jockey's own body weight, separate from the total handicap weight the horse carries. This needs a per-race rider-weight feed that HKJC does not routinely publish, so the data source is unwired (_nan_stub) and the feature sits in the catalogue for completeness only. If activated it would split true rider mass from saddle ballast to better estimate how much of the assigned weight actually presses on the horse's back; for now it does not compute.

H067.description_zh: 鞍具與配重的重量，部分賽馬司法管轄區會單獨公布。HKJC 並無此細項資料，故資料源未接通（_nan_stub），列入目錄僅為完整性。若有數據，可與騎師體重一同把名義負磅拆解為「死重」與「活重」，理論上死重對速度影響略大於活重；現階段不參與計算。
H067.description_en: The weight of the saddle and lead ballast, which some racing jurisdictions report separately. HKJC does not break this out, so the data source is unwired (_nan_stub) and the feature is catalogued for completeness only. With the data it would, alongside jockey weight, decompose nominal carried weight into 'dead' and 'live' load — dead weight is thought to slow a horse slightly more than live weight — but for now it does not compute.

H068.description_zh: 見習騎師的減磅等級，按資歷分為 3／5／7 磅三檔。級別越高代表騎師越生嫩、減磅越多，是 H062 減磅優惠的分類版本，把連續磅數轉為離散經驗訊號。低班讓磅賽中 7 磅見習生的負磅優勢明顯，但須與其策騎穩定性折衷。
H068.description_en: The apprentice's claim grade, banded by experience into 3, 5 or 7 lb levels. A higher claim marks a greener rider with a bigger allowance, and this categorical version of the H062 claim turns continuous pounds into a discrete experience signal. In lower-grade handicaps a 7 lb claimer's weight relief is material, but it is traded off against the rider's lesser polish and consistency.

H069.description_zh: 性別讓磅：雌馬對賽雄馬時可獲約 3 磅補貼，反映兩性平均體能差距。在混合性別的賽事中此優惠直接減輕雌馬須負重量，於同等評分下提升其相對機會，純雄馬或純雌馬賽則不適用。屬規則性調整，模型用以校正負磅的可比性。
H069.description_en: The sex allowance: fillies and mares receive roughly a 3 lb concession when racing against males, reflecting the average physical gap between the sexes. In mixed-sex events this relief directly lightens the female runners' carried weight and lifts their relative chance at equal ratings, and it does not apply in single-sex races. It is a rules-based adjustment the model uses to keep carried weight comparable across runners.

H070.description_zh: 馬齡讓磅（Weight-for-age），以馬匹年齡反映成熟度與耐力曲線，並對應較年輕馬匹（如 3 歲對 4 歲）應獲的讓磅。年輕馬尚在發育，於公平制賽事獲補貼以對抗壯齡馬，而距離越長未成熟的耐力劣勢越突出。是把年齡轉化為可比實力的標準化調整。
H070.description_en: The weight-for-age adjustment, using the horse's age to capture maturity and the stamina curve and the allowance a younger runner (e.g. a 3yo versus a 4yo) should receive. Younger horses are still developing and get a concession in WFA events to offset older, stronger rivals, with the immaturity penalty growing as distance lengthens. It standardises age into comparable ability rather than a raw count.

H071.description_zh: 跑馬地賽事標記（1 為跑馬地，否則沙田）。跑馬地是市區短程草地賽道，圈窄彎急、直路短，配速混亂且閘號與前領優勢遠強於沙田，夜賽燈光與氣氛亦自成一格。此旗標讓模型按場地切換閘號、跑法與配速等先驗，是重要的賽道情境開關。
H071.description_en: A flag marking Happy Valley races (1 for HV, otherwise Sha Tin). Happy Valley is the tight city-centre turf circuit with sharp bends and a short straight, producing chaotic pace and a far stronger draw-and-lead bias than Sha Tin, plus its own floodlit night-meeting character. The flag lets the model switch draw, style and pace priors by venue, making it a key track-context selector.

H072.description_zh: 賽事距離（公尺）。香港主要賽程由 1000m 至 2400m，以 1200／1400／1600m 最普遍，距離決定耐力與速度的比重及最佳跑法。短途（≤1200）配速亂、早段位置至上；中途（1400-1800）配速穩、留後有空間；長途（≥2000）由耐力主導，並與血統、出生月份強交互。
H072.description_en: Race distance in metres. Hong Kong stages 1000m to 2400m with 1200/1400/1600 the dominant trips, and distance drives the stamina-versus-speed mix and the optimal running style. Short trips (≤1200m) have chaotic pace and an early-positional bias, middle trips (1400-1800m) reward tactical riding, and longer trips (≥2000m) turn stamina-driven, interacting strongly with pedigree and foaling month.
H072.notes_zh:
技術層面：短途 (≤1200) 配速 chaos 高、頂位早；中途 (1400-1800) 配速結構穩定、closer 有空間；長途 (≥2000) stamina 主導。距離 × 出生月份、距離 × Dosage 為強交互。
通俗層面：短跑、中距、長距，這在賽馬就像 100m、800m、5000m 的差別。馬匹的體型、血統、跑法都會偏好不同距離。
H072.notes_en:
Technical: short trips (≤1200m) have chaotic pace and an early-positional bias; middle trips (1400-1800m) reward tactical riding; longer trips (≥2000m) become stamina-driven. Distance interacts strongly with pedigree (sire stamina index) and running style.
Layman: sprints, miles, and routes — the equine equivalent of 100m vs 800m vs 5km. Each horse has its preferred distance window.

H073.description_zh: 場地狀況編碼，將草地的好地至軟地（Good=0 … Soft=4）及全天候跑道等映射為有序數值。地質越濕軟越偏好耐力與泥地適應性強的馬，並改變配速與閘號偏差結構。是調節速度型與耐力型先驗的關鍵情境變數，須以賽前公布的場地評級讀取。
H073.description_en: An encoding of the going that maps turf states from firm/good through to soft (Good=0 … Soft=4), plus all-weather, onto an ordered scale. Wetter, softer ground favours stamina and mud-handling horses and reshapes both pace and draw bias. It is a key context variable for tilting speed-type versus stamina-type priors, read from the official pre-race going report.

H074.description_zh: 賽事班次編碼，涵蓋 Class 1-5、Group 1-3、Listed 及 Griffin 等，以有序值表示（如 G1=1 … C5=5）。班次界定對手質素與評分區間，是衡量馬匹近績含金量的尺度——在高班跑出的名次遠重於低班。升班降班與評分趨勢共同影響相對競爭力。
H074.description_en: An encoding of race class spanning Class 1-5, Group 1-3, Listed and Griffin events on an ordered scale (e.g. G1=1 … C5=5). Class defines the calibre of opposition and the rating band, and is the yardstick for how much a horse's recent form is worth — a placing in top grade outweighs the same in a low class. It works with class moves and rating trend to gauge relative competitiveness.

H075.description_zh: 出賽馬匹數目（field size）。馬數越多走位競爭與被困風險越高，閘號與跑法偏差被放大；馬數少則配速可控、爆冷機會降低。小場存在偏差，名次與機率分布在少馬賽中更集中，模型須據場數調整排名與校準的離散度。
H075.description_en: The number of runners in the race (field size). Larger fields raise traffic and interference risk and amplify draw and running-style biases, while small fields make pace more controllable and reduce upsets. There is a small-field bias — finishing positions and probabilities compress with fewer runners — so the model adjusts the spread of its ranking and calibration to field size.

H076.description_zh: 賽事頭馬獎金（港元），由 HKJC 公布，是班次與賽事重要性的強力代理訊號。獎金越高通常對手越強、競爭越激烈，並吸引狀態頂峰的馬匹參賽，與班次、Group/Listed 標記高度相關。模型用以衡量賽事含金量及對近績的加權。
H076.description_en: The first-place prize money in HK dollars, published by HKJC and a strong proxy for class and the importance of the race. Bigger purses generally mean stronger opposition and fiercer competition, drawing horses at peak condition, and it correlates closely with class and the Group/Listed flag. The model uses it to weight a race's prestige and how heavily to count form earned in it.

H077.description_zh: Group／Listed 標記（1 為錦標賽事）。此類賽事為香港賽馬金字塔頂端，雲集最高素質馬匹，採公平讓磅而非殘障讓磅，競爭格局與普通讓磅賽截然不同。旗標讓模型對精英賽切換對手強度與讓磅邏輯的先驗，並提示近績的高含金量。
H077.description_en: A flag for Group or Listed stakes races (1 if so). These sit at the top of Hong Kong's racing pyramid, assemble the highest-calibre horses, and run under weight-for-age conditions rather than handicap, giving a very different competitive shape from ordinary handicaps. The flag lets the model switch its priors on opposition strength and weight logic for elite races and signals premium-value form.

H078.description_zh: 國際賽標記，涵蓋香港國際賽事（HKIR）、冠軍賽馬日等開放海外馬匹參戰的頂級賽事。這類賽事對手跨司法管轄區、實力評估更難，本地評分的可比性下降，且常吸引世界級客串馬。旗標提示模型放寬本地先驗、留意外來競爭帶來的不確定性。
H078.description_en: A flag for international races such as the Hong Kong International Races and Champions Day that open the gates to overseas runners. The cross-jurisdiction field makes ability harder to assess, local ratings become less comparable, and world-class visitors often appear. The flag prompts the model to loosen its home priors and account for the added uncertainty of foreign competition.

H079.description_zh: 賽季階段（早／中／晚季），對應馬匹的狀態週期與練馬師的訓練節奏。早季多為重返狀態、晚季則臨近賽季高峰賽事，馬匹的進步軌跡與操練重心隨之不同。此特徵幫助模型把近績放進賽季語境，辨識正在升軌或開始走下坡的馬匹。
H079.description_en: The phase of the season (early, mid or late), tracking the form cycle and a trainer's preparation rhythm. Early season often means horses building back to fitness while late season approaches peak target races, so improvement trajectories and training emphasis shift accordingly. It helps the model place recent form in seasonal context and spot horses on the way up versus those tailing off.

H080.description_zh: 日賽與夜賽之分：跑馬地多為夜間賽事，沙田多為日間賽事。光照、氣溫與賽道情境差異會影響配速與表現，並與場地及賽道高度相關。此旗標捕捉晝夜環境效應，可與賽事編號、跑馬地標記等共同刻畫夜賽後段速度衰退等現象。
H080.description_en: A day-versus-night distinction: Happy Valley typically races under lights while Sha Tin runs by day. Differences in lighting, temperature and atmosphere affect pace and performance, and the flag is closely tied to venue and surface. It captures the diurnal environment effect and combines with race number and the Happy Valley flag to describe phenomena such as late-card speed fade at night meetings.

H081.description_zh: 賽事當日氣溫（攝氏），取自天氣資料表。高溫高濕會增加馬匹散熱負擔、影響耐力與恢復，香港夏季尤為明顯，亦間接牽動場地與配速。屬環境情境變數，單獨訊號偏弱，主要與濕度、季節及距離交互發揮作用。
H081.description_en: The race-day temperature in Celsius, drawn from the weather table. Hot, humid conditions add to a horse's heat load and tax stamina and recovery, especially in the Hong Kong summer, and indirectly shift going and pace. As an environmental context variable its standalone signal is modest, working mainly through interactions with humidity, season and distance.

H082.description_zh: 賽事當日降雨量（毫米）。雨水直接令草地轉軟、改變場地評級，偏好泥地與耐力型馬匹，並影響配速與閘號偏差，是場地編碼之外的即時濕度訊號。降雨亦可能臨場改變賽事走勢，模型用以捕捉天氣驅動的場地轉變。
H082.description_en: Race-day rainfall in millimetres. Rain softens the turf and shifts the going rating, favouring mud-handlers and stamina types while reshaping pace and draw bias, and it serves as a live moisture signal beyond the static going encoding. Rain can also change a race's complexion at short notice, so the model uses it to capture weather-driven track transitions.

H083.description_zh: 賽事編號，即該日賽程中的卡序（Race 1-11）。卡序與時段、累積使用後的賽道狀況及夜賽後段速度衰退相關，後段賽事的場地與配速可能已被前面賽事磨耗。屬情境變數，常與日夜、場地共同刻畫賽道隨賽日演變的效應。
H083.description_en: The race number, i.e. the card position within the day's programme (Race 1-11). Card position correlates with time of day, cumulative track wear and a tendency for late-card speed fade at night, as the going and pace of later races may already be chewed up by earlier ones. As a context variable it works with day/night and venue to describe how the track evolves across the meeting.

H084.description_zh: 休賽天數（layoff length），即上場至本場的間隔日數。短歇（≤14天）易疲勞，28-49 天通常是「養足又保操態」的理想窗口，>60 天則提示生疏或傷後復出風險。在香港高密度馬廄下逾 90 天多代表獸醫停賽，模型會與練馬師復出勝率共同評估復賽表現。
H084.description_en: Days since the last start (layoff length), the gap between the previous run and today. Short layoffs (≤14d) risk fatigue, 28-49 days is the empirical 'fresh and primed' window, and gaps over 60 days flag rust or post-injury return. In Hong Kong's high-turnover stables a break beyond 90 days usually signals a veterinary stand-down, and the model pairs this with trainer return-from-rest win rate to project comeback form.
H084.notes_zh:
技術層面：layoff penalty 與 trainer_returner_wr [H045] 共同預測復出表現。HK 馬廄密度高，>90d 通常代表獸醫停賽。
通俗層面：間隔幾天最有效？太密集會累，太疏會生疏。看到「久休復賽」是要小心的訊號，可能是傷後復出。
H084.notes_en:
Technical: short layoffs (≤14d) carry fatigue risk; the 28-49 day band is the empirical sweet spot; gaps >60 days are bucketed and combined with trainer_returner_wr [H045] to estimate post-layoff form.
Layman: rest matters. Too soon and the horse is tired; too long and it's lost match-fitness — often a sign of a recent injury, which the model treats with caution.

H085.description_zh: 久休懲罰：對歇賽超過約 60 天的馬匹施加的折扣項，是 H084 休賽天數的非線性處理。長時間缺賽往往伴隨操態流失或傷患恢復，復出多需一兩仗熱身才回勇，故模型按缺賽長度遞減其勝算預期。須與練馬師復出能力及體重變動同看，個別善於養馬的馬廄可部分抵銷此懲罰。
H085.description_en: A penalty that discounts horses returning from a layoff longer than about 60 days, the non-linear counterpart to the H084 day count. Long absences tend to coincide with lost match-fitness or recovery from injury, and returners often need a run or two to find form, so the model trims their expected chance by gap length. It is read with trainer comeback skill and body-weight movement, since stables good at freshening horses can partly offset the penalty.

H086.description_zh: 評分趨勢，即馬匹近數仗讓磅評分的斜率（slope）。上升的評分往往預示狀態回勇、未來表現向好，比靜態評分數值更具預測力；下滑則暗示正失去班次競爭力。趨勢須以賽前評分讀取避免前視，並與升降班、負磅變動互相印證。
H086.description_en: Rating trend, the slope of the horse's handicap rating over its recent starts. A rising mark often pre-empts an in-form run and carries more signal than the static rating level, while a falling slope flags a horse losing its class. The slope is read from pre-race ratings to avoid look-ahead and is cross-checked against class moves and weight changes.

H087.description_zh: 降班標記（1 為由高班降至低班）。降班馬面對較弱對手，相對實力上升，往往是練馬師為求勝而部署的明顯利好訊號，尤其搭配評分回落或負磅減輕時。但須留意降班亦可能因狀態下滑而起，模型會結合評分趨勢與近績分辨「擇肥而噬」與「每況愈下」。
H087.description_en: A flag for dropping in class (1 if moved down from a higher grade). A class-dropper meets weaker opposition so its relative ability rises, and it is often a deliberate trainer placement aimed at a win, especially when paired with an easing rating or lighter weight. But a drop can also stem from declining form, so the model combines it with rating trend and recent results to tell 'well placed' from 'on the slide'.

H088.display_name_zh: 連勝紀錄（Journal of Prediction Markets）
H088.description_zh: 馬匹截至今仗為止的連續頭馬場數，於每次落敗時清零。連勝代表狀態、班次與步伐正處上升軌，是動量訊號；但連勝多伴隨評分急升與加磅，模型須與班次跳升一併權衡，慎防「贏到頂」。
H088.description_en: The count of consecutive wins a horse carries into today's race, reset to zero on any defeat. A live streak captures momentum — form, fitness and confidence all peaking at once — and tends to predict another bold run. The caveat is that winning hikes the handicap rating and weight, so a long streak often coincides with a class rise the model must discount.

H089.display_name_zh: 連敗紀錄（Journal of Prediction Markets）
H089.description_zh: 馬匹連續未能奪冠的場數，於下次頭馬時清零。長期連敗多反映班次過高、狀態回落或傷患，是負向動量訊號；惟須留意連敗常壓低評分，當馬匹終獲減磅、跌入合適班次時，反成翻身契機。
H089.description_en: The run of consecutive starts without a win, reset the moment the horse next salutes. A lengthening loss streak typically flags a horse racing above its mark, out of form, or carrying a niggle, and points to another below-par finish. The nuance is that losses erode the rating, so a horse deep in a streak is also dropping in class and may be nearing a winnable spot.

H090.description_zh: 馬匹對上一仗的正式名次，是最即時的近績指標。上仗成績與今仗表現高度相關，屬 Benter 體系的核心變數之一，名次愈前訊號愈強；惟須結合班次、步速與賽程順逆解讀，避免單看名次而忽略際遇因素。
H090.description_en: The official finishing position from the horse's most recent start — the single most immediate recency signal. Last-start form correlates strongly with today's result and is a staple Benter-style variable, with a sharp last placing carrying real predictive weight. It must be read alongside class, pace and trip, since a poor number can mask an unlucky run and a win can flatter an easy race.

H091.description_zh: 馬匹上仗衝線時落後頭馬的馬位數，量化敗陣的「實際距離」而非僅名次。微距落敗往往比名次更能反映競爭力，是經典 Benter 變數；惟須對賽程與步速調整，慢步速下的細微差距與惡鬥後的敗距意義截然不同。
H091.description_en: The margin in lengths by which the horse trailed the winner last start, quantifying the true closeness of the defeat rather than the bare placing. A narrow beating often signals more ability than the finishing number suggests, making it a classic Benter variable. It should be normalised for trip and pace, since a length lost in a slow-run race means something very different from one lost in a true-run battle.

H092.description_zh: 上仗分段時間相對該程標準時間（par）的殘差，正值代表跑快於標準、負值代表跑慢。此特徵旨在剝離步速與賽道狀況以衡量真實速度水平；惟 HKJC 未提供完整官方分段標準，目前未接通數據，僅作目錄完整性保留。
H092.description_en: The residual of last start's sectional times against the par time for that course and distance, with a positive value meaning the horse ran faster than standard. The intent is to strip out pace and track bias to isolate genuine speed quality. As HK lacks a wired-up official par-sectional source, this feature is currently inactive and held in the catalogue for completeness only.

H093.description_zh: Rowlands 終段速度百分比（FSP），衡量馬匹尾段速度佔全程平均速度的比率，反映後勁與步速儲備。高 FSP 多見於後上型且具上名潛力的馬；惟 HKJC 公開分段數據未接通，此特徵目前停用，僅列於目錄以備將來。
H093.description_en: The Rowlands Finishing Speed Percentage, expressing a horse's closing-sectional speed as a ratio of its average speed for the trip — a measure of late-pace reserve and acceleration. A high FSP marks horses that finish strongly and are primed to place. With HK public sectional data not wired up, the feature is currently inactive and listed for catalogue completeness.

H094.description_zh: 馬匹近 60 日內最近一次試閘的名次與時間。試閘是 HKJC 公開的非正式操練，用以證明馬匹狀態與閘廂安全，名次靠前（前三）加優異時間是出賽前的強力近況訊號，尤利首戰、復出或近期無公開操練的馬。需配合 H095 晨操一併評估。
H094.description_en: The most recent barrier-trial result within 60 days. Trials are unofficial gallops HKJC publishes to show a horse is fit and gate-safe; a top-three trial position paired with a smart clocking is a strong pre-race form signal, especially for first-time runners, horses off a break, or those without a recent public gallop. It is best read together with H095 trackwork.
H094.notes_zh:
技術層面：試閘成績 ≤ 3 名 + 時間優異是強訊號，特別是首場、復出前、或近兩個月未出賽馬。配合 trackwork [H095] 一同評估。
通俗層面：試閘就像「正賽前的彩排」，馬匹假裝比賽一次。試閘跑得好通常表示練馬師覺得牠準備好了。
H094.notes_en:
Technical: trial finishing position within the top three combined with a fast clocking is a meaningful form signal, especially for first-time runners, horses returning from a break, or those without a public gallop in the last 14 days. Pairs with H095 trackwork.
Layman: a trial is a dress rehearsal — the horse races for real but the result doesn't count. A sharp trial usually means the trainer thinks it's ready.

H095.description_zh: HKJC 公布的近 14 日晨操路程與速度紀錄，反映馬匹備戰的工作量與作勢。穩定而具質量的快操多預示狀態到位，是出賽前的隱性近況指標；惟操練意圖因練馬師而異，須結合試閘 [H094] 與班次脈絡解讀，避免過度解讀單次快閘。
H095.description_en: The horse's gallop distance and speed over the last 14 days as published by HKJC, a proxy for the volume and intent of its preparation. Consistent, quality fast work often pre-empts a fit, forward showing and serves as a hidden readiness signal. Trainer patterns vary, so it is best interpreted alongside H094 trial form rather than over-reading any single sharp piece of work.

H096.description_zh: 騎師連續策騎同一匹馬的場數。穩定的人馬組合代表默契累積與馬房信任，往往對應更佳的際遇與發揮；而換馬常隱含負面訊號，但頂級騎師臨時上陣亦可能是強化訊號，須與騎師質素一併解讀。
H096.description_en: The number of consecutive starts a horse has been partnered by the same jockey. A settled pairing reflects accumulated rapport and stable confidence, and tends to translate into smoother trips and more reliable runs. A broken streak can hint at a negative angle, though a top rider taking over is itself a positive — so it is read in concert with jockey quality.

H097.description_zh: 今仗相對上仗有任何裝備改動的標記。裝備變動代表練馬師主動嘗試解決問題或激發表現，是意圖訊號；不同裝備效果各異，此泛旗須與首次眼罩 [H099]、多重變動 [H103] 等具體項目結合，方能判別利淡或利好。
H097.description_en: A flag marking any gear change versus the horse's previous start. A gear change signals deliberate trainer intervention — an attempt to fix an issue or unlock improvement — and so carries intent. Because different items pull in different directions, this catch-all is most useful combined with specific markers such as first-time blinkers (H099) and multiple changes (H103).

H098.description_zh: 馬匹首次配戴某項裝備的標記。首次裝備屬未經驗證的變數，既可能即時改善表現，亦可能適應不良，不確定性高；模型通常視之為練馬師的積極嘗試訊號，並與首次眼罩 [H099] 等更具方向性的項目區分權衡。
H098.description_en: A flag for gear the horse is wearing for the very first time. First-time equipment is an untested variable: it may spark immediate improvement or backfire as the horse adjusts, so it carries genuine uncertainty. The model treats it as evidence of a proactive trainer angle, weighed apart from more directional items like first-time blinkers (H099).

H099.description_zh: 眼罩加戴或除下的標記。首次加戴眼罩是公認的強訊號——藉收窄視野提升專注，常令過往「跑唔出」的馬即時進步；除下眼罩則訊號相反。此項在 pace 與跑法交互下尤其值得留意。
H099.description_en: A flag for blinkers going on or coming off. First-time blinkers are a well-known strong angle: by narrowing a horse's vision they sharpen focus and can spark instant improvement in a previously unfocused runner, while blinkers coming off signals the reverse. The effect is especially worth weighting in combination with pace and running-style context.

H100.description_zh: 馬銜或綁舌帶等口部裝備首次改動的標記，多用以改善控馬與呼吸順暢。此類細項偶能解鎖被收得太緊或亂跑馬匹的潛力；惟 HKJC 此層級裝備數據未接通，目前停用，僅作目錄完整性保留。
H100.description_en: A flag for a first-time change of bit or tongue tie — mouthpiece equipment used to improve control and air flow. Such fine adjustments can occasionally unlock a horse that fights its rider or hangs. As this granular gear data is not wired up for HK, the feature is currently inactive and retained for catalogue completeness only.

H101.description_zh: 蹄鐵改動標記，例如改用條形蹄鐵（bar shoe）或膠黏蹄鐵（glue-on），通常為應對蹄部問題或改善抓地。蹄鐵變化偶可暗示馬匹蹄況或場地適應的轉變；惟 HKJC 蹄鐵數據未接通，此特徵目前停用，列於目錄以備將來。
H101.description_en: A flag for a shoeing change such as a bar shoe or glue-on, usually applied to manage a foot problem or improve grip. Shoeing tweaks can occasionally hint at a hoof issue or a surface-adaptation move. As HK shoeing records are not wired up, the feature is currently inactive and listed for catalogue completeness.

H102.description_zh: 馬鞍改動標記，例如合成鞍與皮鞍之別，屬極冷僻的邊際特徵，理論上影響負重分布與騎師舒適度。實際預測訊號微弱，且 HKJC 並無此層級數據，目前停用，僅作目錄完整性保留。
H102.description_en: A flag for a saddle change, such as synthetic versus leather — a deeply obscure edge feature that in theory touches weight distribution and rider comfort. Any real predictive signal is marginal at best, and HK carries no data at this granularity, so the feature is inactive and held purely for catalogue completeness.

H103.description_zh: 今仗同時改動的裝備項目數量。多項裝備一次過更換，反映練馬師對馬匹現狀的重大不滿或大幅調整意圖，訊號強度高於單一變動；惟方向不明——可能是力挽狂瀾，也可能是孤注一擲，須結合班次與近況脈絡判讀。
H103.description_en: The count of gear items changed at once for today's race. Multiple simultaneous changes reflect a major trainer rethink and a stronger intent signal than any single tweak. The direction is ambiguous, however — it can mark a determined fix or a last-roll-of-the-dice gamble — so it is best read against class and recent-form context.

H104.description_zh: 用藥變動標記。在美國賽馬中藥物（尤其 Lasix）改動是經典強訊號，惟香港全面禁止比賽日用藥，故此特徵在 HK 僅能對應有限的醫療標記，相關完整數據未接通，目前停用，僅作目錄完整性保留。
H104.description_en: A flag for a medication change. In US racing a medication switch — notably Lasix — is a classic strong angle, but Hong Kong bans race-day medication outright, so the feature maps only to limited HK medical markers. The full underlying data is not wired up, leaving it inactive and retained for catalogue completeness.

H105.description_zh: 馬匹近 30 日內是否錄得獸醫紀錄（HKJC vetrecord／OVE 紀錄）的標記。出賽前的獸醫條目可能暗示傷病、流血或需通過獸醫檢查復出，多屬風險訊號；惟紀錄性質不一，輕微檢查與嚴重傷患意義懸殊，須謹慎權衡。
H105.description_en: A flag for any veterinary entry against the horse within the last 30 days, drawn from the HKJC vet-record database. A pre-race vet note can hint at a recent injury, bleeding, or a required vet clearance to resume, and generally reads as a risk signal. The nature of entries varies widely, so a routine check and a serious setback carry very different weight.

H106.description_zh: 馬匹是否曾接受喉部（roarer，喘鳴症）手術的標記，源自 HKJC 公開的喉嚨手術馬匹紀錄。喉部手術反映過往呼吸障礙，術後表現分歧——部分馬匹氣道改善後大躍進，部分則難復舊觀，故此旗多作風險與潛在反彈的雙向參考。
H106.description_en: A flag for whether a horse has undergone wind (roarer) surgery, sourced from HKJC's published throat-operation register. The mark reflects a prior breathing impairment, and post-op outcomes split sharply — some horses leap forward once their airway is fixed while others never recapture their best. It therefore serves as a two-sided cue for both risk and potential rebound.

H107.description_zh: 馬匹獸醫紀錄後首次復出的標記。傷病或療程後的首仗充滿不確定性——既可能未完全康復而失準，亦可能煥然一新；模型多視之為高方差訊號。惟相關數據未接通，此特徵目前停用，僅作目錄完整性保留。
H107.description_en: A flag for a horse's first start back after a veterinary entry. A return run following injury or treatment is highly uncertain — the horse may be undercooked and below par, or freshened and revitalised — so the model treats it as a high-variance signal. The underlying data is not wired up, leaving the feature inactive and held for catalogue completeness.

H108.description_zh: 預估賽事步速：0 慢、1 中、2 快，由場上確認的前置速度馬數量推算。多匹搶前者意味前段惡鬥、步速熾熱，利好後上型；步速慢則利領跑馬偷雞。步速 × 跑法交互 [H110] 是步速讓磅分析的核心。
H108.description_en: A forecast of race pace — 0 slow, 1 medium, 2 fast — derived from the number of confirmed early-speed runners in the field. Many leaders means a scorching, contested pace that sets up the closers, while a slow tempo lets a lone front-runner steal the race. The pace × running-style cross-term (H110) is the heart of pace handicapping.
H108.notes_zh:
技術層面：fast pace 通常利好 closer，slow pace 利好 leader/stalker。pace × style 交互 [H110] 是 Brisnet 經典 angle [B11][B12]。
通俗層面：場上有幾匹搶快的馬？多匹搶快，前段會跑得太兇，最後讓追逐型反勝；少匹搶快，領跑馬就能輕鬆控速。
H108.notes_en:
Technical: a fast forecast pace creates a 'closers' race'; a slow pace lets a lone leader steal it. The pace × running-style cross-term [H110] is one of Brisnet's classic angles [B11][B12].
Layman: how many horses want to lead? If they all want to lead, they'll burn each other out and the closers come over the top. If only one wants to lead, it can dictate from the front.

H109.description_zh: 跑法風格分類：0 領跑、1 緊隨、2 中游、3 後上，由歷史首段位置均值推算。跑法與步速、閘位、路程均有強交互，是制定際遇預期的基礎；配合跑法純度 [H120] 評估可靠性——純度高者，模型對其風格的信賴度更高。
H109.description_en: A running-style class — 0 front-runner, 1 stalker, 2 midfield, 3 closer — derived from the average first-call position across the horse's history. Style interacts powerfully with the pace forecast, gate draw and distance, framing the kind of trip a horse will get. It pairs with style purity (H120): the more reliably a horse races to type, the more the model can trust its style label.
H109.notes_zh:
技術層面：style 與 pace、draw、distance 都有強交互。HK 跑法純度 [H120] 配合 style 為穩定性指標：跑法純度高的馬，模型可信度更高。
通俗層面：每匹馬都有偏好的跑法 — 喜歡領頭跑、跟著跑、還是後段衝。看牠以前怎麼跑就大致知道。
H109.notes_en:
Technical: running-style interacts with pace forecast, gate draw, and distance. Style purity [H120] measures how reliably a horse races to type — high purity makes the style signal more trustworthy.
Layman: every horse has a preference — go to the front, sit just off the pace, hang in midfield, or come from the back. Knowing the preference tells you when the race conditions suit it.

H110.description_zh: 自身跑法與預估賽事步速的契合度，跑法配步速者獲加成。後上馬遇熾熱步速、領跑馬遇慢步速，皆能搶佔際遇優勢，是步速讓磅的具體落地；此項本質是 H108 步速與 H109 跑法的交互項，須兩者皆可靠時訊號方強。
H110.description_en: A measure of how well a horse's own running style fits the forecast race pace, awarding a bonus when the two align. A closer drawn into a hot pace, or a leader into a soft one, gains a structural trip advantage — the concrete payoff of pace handicapping. By nature it is the interaction of H108 pace and H109 style, so the signal is strongest only when both inputs are reliable.

H111.description_zh: 閘號與賽事步速的交互加成，依據閘位 × 步速矩陣評估馬匹的位置優勢。內閘配快步速、外閘配特定步速等組合，會顯著左右走位順逆，是 HK 細場與賽道形狀下的關鍵際遇因素；沙田與跑馬地閘位效應各異，須按場地與路程細分。
H111.description_en: A bonus from the interaction of gate draw and race pace, scored off a draw × pace matrix that captures a horse's positional edge. Combinations such as an inside draw into a fast pace can sharply shape whether a horse gets a smooth or compromised trip — a key trip factor given HK's field sizes and tight tracks. Draw effects differ between Sha Tin and Happy Valley, so it is segmented by course and distance.

H112.description_zh: 馬匹歷來於第一個分段（first call）取得領先的頻率，量化其真正的領跑能力。高領跑頻率代表穩定的前置速度，在步速慢或內閘有利時極具優勢；惟與跑法分類 [H109] 互補——領跑指數提供領先「純度」，避免將偶發搶前誤判為領跑型。
H112.description_en: The frequency with which a horse has led at the first call across its history, quantifying genuine front-running ability. A high lead rate denotes reliable early speed that becomes a major edge when the pace is soft or an inside draw helps. It complements the style class (H109) by supplying the purity of that lead, guarding against mislabelling an occasional flier as a true front-runner.

H113.description_zh: Brisnet 風格的 E1 早段速度指數，量度短途首 2F／中距首 4F 的初段速度，捕捉馬匹爭奪領先的爆發力。E1 是步速形勢與領跑能力的基石指標；惟 HKJC 並無 Brisnet 速度數據，此特徵目前停用，僅作目錄完整性保留。
H113.description_en: A Brisnet-style E1 early-speed figure measuring velocity over the opening 2f (sprints) or 4f (routes), capturing a horse's burst to contest the lead. E1 is a foundational gauge of pace shape and front-running ability. As HK carries no Brisnet figure data, the feature is currently inactive and retained for catalogue completeness.

H114.description_zh: Brisnet 風格的 E2 早段速度指數，量度短途首 4F／中距首 6F 的速度，較 E1 更能反映馬匹維持前段速度的能力。E2 對判別「衝得快但守不住」的馬尤為有用；惟 HKJC 無此速度數據，此特徵目前停用，僅作目錄完整性保留。
H114.description_en: A Brisnet-style E2 early-speed figure over the first 4f (sprints) or 6f (routes), extending E1 to reflect how well a horse sustains its early speed. E2 is especially useful for spotting runners that burst fast but cannot hold it. With no Brisnet figure source for HK, the feature is currently inactive and held for catalogue completeness.

H115.description_zh: Rowlands 風格的後段速度（LP），量度馬匹尾段分段的速度水平，反映後勁與衝刺力。高後段速度是後上型上名的關鍵，並與終段速度% [H093] 互補；惟此項本地分段數據有限，須謹慎解讀其覆蓋與穩定性。
H115.description_en: A Rowlands-style Late Pace figure measuring a horse's velocity over the closing sectional, a read on finishing kick and stamina in reserve. Strong late pace is the engine behind closers grabbing a placing and complements the Finishing Speed % (H093). Local sectional coverage is limited, so its reliability and completeness should be read with care.

H116.description_zh: 前段速度（EP），取馬匹歷史早段速度比率的均值，衡量其慣常的初段步速投入。高 EP 代表領跑或緊隨傾向，是判斷步速形勢與走位的基礎輸入；須與後段速度 [H115] 一併觀察——前快後慢者宜防被後上反超。
H116.description_en: An Early Pace figure taken as the average of a horse's historical early-speed ratios, gauging how much initial tempo it habitually commits. A high EP marks a leading or stalking tendency and is a base input for reading pace shape and likely positioning. It is best viewed against Late Pace (H115), since a fast-early, slow-late profile is vulnerable to being run down by closers.

H117.description_zh: 統計同場具前領／搶閘特性（early-speed）的對手數量，量度賽事的領放競爭強度。前領馬越多，前段越可能互相搶速、過早消耗，從而改變整場配速形態與有利的跑法。此特徵本身不偏好任何一匹馬，須與該駒自身跑法交互（見配速受益者）方能轉化為位次信號。
H117.description_en: Counts how many rivals in the field profile as early-speed / front-running types, gauging the contest for the lead. The more pace-setters present, the more likely they burn each other off up front, reshaping the whole tempo and tilting the race toward off-the-pace runners. On its own it favours no single horse — it only becomes a finishing-position signal once crossed with the subject horse's own running style.

H118.description_zh: 標記上仗在熾熱配速（hot pace）下仍能後上、衝刺不墜的後追型馬匹，視作配速壓力的「生還者」。能在崩盤配速中保持衝刺，往往反映真實的後段體能與韌性，是強隊形信號。此因子依賴上仗逐段配速資料，現階段在 HK 資料管線中尚未接通（_nan_stub），列於目錄以備完整性。
H118.description_en: Flags closers that, in their last start, withstood a genuinely hot pace and still finished strongly — the "survivors" of pace pressure. Sustaining a finishing kick when the tempo collapses up front signals real late-stage stamina and toughness, a positive form marker. The factor needs sectional pace data from prior runs that is not yet wired into the HK pipeline (currently a NaN stub); it sits in the catalogue for completeness.

H119.description_zh: 將該駒的後追跑法與本場預期配速壓力交互，當前段越熾熱、後追馬獲得的加成越大。原理是兇猛領放會令前領馬尾段乏力，替後上者騰出空間與名次，故同一匹後追馬在快配速場次的勝算高於慢配速場次。屬隊形交互特徵，須配合配速壓力（H117）與跑法純度一併解讀。
H119.description_en: Crosses a horse's closing running style with the expected pace pressure of the race, awarding a larger bonus the hotter the projected early tempo. A fierce front-end means the leaders empty out late, opening lanes and positions for off-the-pace runners, so the same closer rates higher in a fast-pace race than a slow one. It is a shape-interaction term and is best read alongside pace pressure (H117) and style purity.

H120.description_zh: 計算該駒過往出賽中採用其主導跑法（領放／居前／後追）的場次比例，量度跑法的一致性與可預測性。純度高代表跑法穩定，配速與隊形推演更可靠；純度低則戰術多變，令配速類因子的信號變得噪雜。常作為其他配速交互特徵的可信度權重，而非直接的強弱指標。
H120.description_en: Measures the share of a horse's past starts run in its dominant style (lead / prominent / closer), quantifying how consistent and predictable its running pattern is. High purity means a stable style, making pace and shape projections more reliable; low purity flags a tactically versatile horse that adds noise to pace-based factors. It usually acts as a confidence weight on the other pace-interaction features rather than a strength signal in its own right.

H121.description_zh: 量度該駒在賽程中平均超越的名次數，即從早段位置到終點淨升的位次。穩定的後上幅度反映後段速度與得閘後爆發力，是跑法質素的直接指標，並有助判別其後追標籤是否真實。須注意此值受場次配速與隊形左右——慢配速場難以後上，故宜與配速壓力交互理解，避免高估或低估。
H121.description_en: Captures the average number of positions a horse gains during a race — the net places picked up from its early running spot to the line. A consistent overtaking margin reflects late-race speed and finishing burst, a direct read on running quality and on whether a closer label is genuine. Note the value is pace- and shape-dependent: a slow tempo makes ground hard to recover, so it is best interpreted against pace pressure rather than taken at face value.

H122.description_zh: CHRI 為本系統內部綜合指數，取久歇懲罰、跑法班次與距離適應度三者的平均，作為單一概覽分數。當各項因子互相衝突（例如評分高但久未上陣）時，提供一個快速的整體健康度判讀。屬粗略 health-check，並非精細信號，宜當總覽而非取代細項因子。
H122.description_en: CHRI is an in-house composite that averages the layoff penalty, running-style class, and distance-adaptation scores into a single roll-up indicator. It offers a quick read on overall condition when the individual factors disagree — say a strong rating paired with a long absence. It is a coarse health-check rather than a fine-grained signal, best used as an overview, not a replacement for the underlying cells.
H122.notes_zh:
技術層面：CHRI = mean(layoff_penalty, style_score, dist_adapt)。粗略 health-check 指標；當單一因子衝突時 (例如評分高但久歇) 提供總覽。
通俗層面：把幾個重要因素合在一起的綜合分數，讓你一眼看出一匹馬整體狀態是好是壞，不用一個一個翻細項。
H122.notes_en:
Technical: composite of layoff penalty, running-style score, and distance adaptation — a coarse health-check used when individual factors conflict (e.g. strong rating but long layoff).
Layman: a single overall score combining several important factors, so you can sense the horse's overall condition at a glance instead of reading every cell.

H123.description_zh: 美國《每日賽馬報》（DRF）標準速度評級，已就場地快慢（track variant）校正，使不同日子的時間可作比較。它能將純時間表現量化為跨場可比的速度數字，理論上對排位甚具參考價值。惟此指數需美國賽事資料，未涵蓋 HKJC，目前停用且超出範圍（_nan_stub），僅列於目錄以備完整。
H123.description_en: The Daily Racing Form's standard US speed figure, adjusted for the daily track variant so times from different days become comparable. By turning raw time into a cross-race speed number it would, in principle, be a strong ranking input. But it relies on US race data not available for HKJC, so it is currently inactive and out of scope (a NaN stub), listed only for catalogue completeness.

H124.description_zh: 英國／歐洲主流的 Timeform 大師評分，內含配速與場地軟硬（going）調整，是當地評估馬匹能力的核心指標。其優勢在於以統一尺度衡量表現質素，可作能力排序的有力依據。惟此評分依賴 UK/EU 資料，與 HKJC 不接軌，現階段停用、超出範圍（_nan_stub），僅備目錄完整。
H124.description_en: The Timeform Master Rating used widely across the UK and Europe, built with pace and going adjustments to express a horse's underlying ability on a single scale. Its strength is a unified yardstick for performance quality, a powerful basis for ability ranking. It depends on UK/EU data that does not map to HKJC, so it is inactive and out of scope here (a NaN stub), kept purely for completeness.

H125.description_zh: 英國《賽馬郵報》評分（Racing Post Rating），結合負磅與往績狀態評估馬匹能力，是 Timeform 之外的另一主流尺度。它把負重與近況整合為單一能力值，理論上有助位次預測。惟其數據源自 UK 賽事，未涵蓋 HKJC，現停用且超出範圍（_nan_stub），列於目錄僅為完整。
H125.description_en: The Racing Post Rating, a UK alternative to Timeform that folds carried weight and recent form into a single ability mark. Combining weight and form into one number would, in theory, aid finishing-position prediction. Its data comes from UK racing and is not available for HKJC, so it stays inactive and out of scope (a NaN stub), present only for completeness.

H126.description_zh: Brisnet 的 Prime Power 綜合指數，融合速度、配速與班次等多項要素為單一動力評分，是美國賽事常用的綜合能力指標。其整合多維表現的特性，本可作有力的排序輸入。惟此指數需美國資料，未接通 HKJC，目前停用且超出範圍（_nan_stub），僅列目錄以備完整。
H126.description_en: Brisnet's Prime Power, a composite that blends speed, pace, and class into one all-round power score widely used in US racing. Rolling several dimensions into a single ability number would make it a strong ranking input. It requires US data not wired up for HKJC, so it is currently inactive and out of scope (a NaN stub), listed only for completeness.

H127.description_zh: Brisnet 為馬匹在各場次計算的班次評分（class figure），量度其面對對手的素質層級。班次是賽馬位次的核心驅動，故此值理論上對排序甚有價值。惟其源自美國賽事資料，未涵蓋 HKJC，現階段停用且超出範圍（_nan_stub），僅列於目錄以備完整。
H127.description_en: Brisnet's per-race class figure, quantifying the quality of opposition a horse has faced in each start.
