Class is a core driver of finishing position, so such a figure would in principle be valuable for ranking. It derives from US race data not available for HKJC, leaving it inactive and out of scope (a NaN stub), kept only for completeness.

H128.description_zh: 英國《賽馬郵報》的 Topspeed 純時間速度評級，僅以完成時間（非能力觀感）評估表現，與 RPR 互補。純時間指標可揭示被低估的速度型馬，理論上有助排位。惟此評級依賴 UK 賽事資料，與 HKJC 不接軌，目前停用且超出範圍（_nan_stub），列於目錄僅為完整。
H128.description_en: The Racing Post's Topspeed rating, a pure clock-based figure that judges performance on finishing time rather than perceived ability, complementing RPR. A raw-time measure can surface underrated speed horses and would, in theory, aid ranking. It relies on UK race data that does not map to HKJC, so it is inactive and out of scope (a NaN stub), present only for completeness.

H129.description_zh: Equibase 速度指數，含場內（ITV）與場間（DTV）雙層校正，使同場與跨場的時間皆可比較。雙層校正能更精準還原真實速度表現，理論上是有力排序依據。惟其數據源自美國賽事，未涵蓋 HKJC，現停用且超出範圍（_nan_stub），僅列目錄以備完整。
H129.description_en: The Equibase speed figure, applying both intra-track (ITV) and day-to-day (DTV) corrections so times are comparable within and across meetings. The dual-layer adjustment recovers true speed more precisely and would be a strong ranking basis in principle. Its data is from US racing and not available for HKJC, so it stays inactive and out of scope (a NaN stub), kept only for completeness.

H130.description_zh: Equibase 配速指數，將賽事拆為早、中、晚三段量度速度分佈，用以推演隊形與跑法優劣。逐段配速可揭示馬匹是前快尾乏抑或後上有力，本可強化配速類交互特徵。惟此數據需美國賽事，未接通 HKJC，目前停用且超出範圍（_nan_stub），僅列目錄以備完整。
H130.description_en: The Equibase pace figure, splitting a race into early, middle, and late fractions to map how speed is distributed and infer race shape. Sectional pace reveals whether a horse fades after a fast start or finishes strongly, and would reinforce the pace-interaction features. The data needs US racing not wired to HKJC, so it is inactive and out of scope (a NaN stub), listed only for completeness.

H131.description_zh: Ragozin Sheets 美式速度評級，採「數字越低越好」的尺度標示每場表現，並對負磅與場地校正。其揭示能力曲線與隱形進步的特長，理論上對排位很有價值。惟此指標源自美國賽事資料，未涵蓋 HKJC，現停用且超出範圍（_nan_stub），僅列於目錄以備完整。
H131.description_en: The Ragozin Sheets, a US figure-maker where a lower number marks a better performance, with adjustments for weight and surface. Its knack for exposing ability curves and hidden improvement would, in theory, be valuable for ranking. It draws on US race data not available for HKJC, so it is inactive and out of scope (a NaN stub), present only for completeness.

H132.description_zh: 多條件加權的實際對預期比（Actual/Expected），即實際勝出次數相對由賠率隱含的預期勝出次數之比；大於 1 代表跑贏市場預期。它直接量度某情境（場地、距離、班次等）下相對市場的長期優勢，是價值與過往效率的綜合信號。樣本小的條件須施以收縮先驗（shrinkage）回歸基準，避免被少數樣本誤導。
H132.description_en: A multi-condition weighted Actual/Expected ratio — actual wins divided by the wins implied by starting odds — where a value above 1 means a horse or angle beats market expectation. It directly measures long-run edge over the market within a context (surface, distance, class, etc.), a combined signal of value and past efficiency. Thin-sample conditions are pulled toward the baseline with a shrinkage prior so a handful of starts cannot distort the figure.

H133.description_zh: 距離與場地的聯合鍵（joint key），把如草地 1600 米與全天候跑道 1600 米視為不同情境分開建模。同一距離在不同地面對速度、體能與跑法的要求各異，分開處理能更準確捕捉馬匹的真實適應度。在香港尤關鍵——沙田草地、沙地與跑馬地各具特性，混為一談會稀釋信號。
H133.description_en: A joint distance×surface key that treats, say, turf 1600m and all-weather 1600m as distinct contexts modelled separately. The same trip places different demands on speed, stamina, and style depending on the going, so splitting them captures a horse's true aptitude more accurately. It matters acutely in Hong Kong, where Sha Tin turf, the dirt track, and Happy Valley each behave differently — lumping them together dilutes the signal.

H134.description_zh: 班次與馬齡的聯合鍵，捕捉如三歲馬升上第二班時的投資回報率（ROI）等情境效應。年輕馬升班的進退表現與成熟馬截然不同，按齡×班分層能揭示單看班次或馬齡都會錯失的優勢區。屬交互特徵，樣本稀薄的格子須以收縮先驗向整體基準回歸。
H134.description_en: A joint class×age key that captures context effects such as the ROI of a three-year-old stepping up to Class 2. Young horses moving up in grade perform very differently from seasoned ones, so stratifying by age and class exposes edges that neither factor reveals alone. As an interaction term, sparse cells are shrunk toward the overall baseline with a prior.

H135.description_zh: 騎師與場地的聯合勝率（joint WR），量度個別騎師在特定馬場的長期表現，例如某騎師於跑馬地的強項。跑馬地窄而急彎多、沙田寬闊，騎師對場地節奏與走位的熟練度差異明顯，會直接影響位次。小樣本格子須收縮處理，並採用賽前可得資料（point-in-time，no look-ahead）以防數據洩漏。
H135.description_en: A joint jockey×venue win-rate measuring a rider's long-run record at a specific track — for instance a jockey who excels round tight, turning Happy Valley versus the wide expanse of Sha Tin. Familiarity with a course's rhythm and positioning materially affects finishing spots. Sparse cells are shrunk, and only point-in-time, pre-race data is used to avoid look-ahead leakage.

H136.description_zh: 騎師與距離的聯合勝率，捕捉個別騎師在不同程途的強弱差異，例如某騎師短途與中距 ROI 的落差。出閘搶位、配速判斷與留力時機隨距離而變，部分騎師明顯偏擅短途或長途。屬交互特徵，樣本不足時以收縮先驗回歸基準，並嚴格採用賽前可得數據避免前瞻偏差。
H136.description_en: A joint jockey×distance win-rate capturing how a rider's effectiveness shifts by trip — say the gap between a jockey's sprint and middle-distance ROI. Break positioning, pace judgement, and when to ask for an effort all change with distance, and some riders are clearly better over one range. As an interaction it is shrunk toward baseline on thin samples and built strictly from pre-race data to avoid look-ahead bias.

H137.description_zh: 練馬師與場地的聯合勝率，反映個別馬房在特定馬場的長期成績，例如部分練馬師明顯偏好沙地。練馬師對不同場地的備戰、出賽編排與場地偏好，會系統性影響旗下馬匹表現。屬交互特徵，小樣本須收縮回歸基準，並以賽前可得資料計算以防數據洩漏。
H137.description_en: A joint trainer×venue win-rate reflecting a yard's long-run record at a given track — some trainers clearly favour the dirt, for example. A trainer's preparation, race placement, and track preferences systematically shape how their horses run at each venue. It is an interaction term, shrunk toward baseline on small samples and computed from point-in-time data to prevent leakage.

H138.description_zh: 練馬師與班次的聯合角度（angle），量度個別馬房在特定班次層級的長期效率，類同 Brisnet 的 trainer angle 思路。練馬師各有擅長的班次區間——有的精於低班磨練、有的善於高班爭勝，按班分層可揭示其真實強項。屬交互特徵，樣本稀薄須以收縮先驗向基準回歸。
H138.description_en: A joint trainer×class angle measuring a yard's long-run efficiency at a given grade, in the spirit of a Brisnet trainer angle. Trainers have class bands they excel in — some grind out wins in the lower grades, others target the top — and stratifying by class surfaces those true strengths. As an interaction it shrinks toward baseline on thin samples.

H139.description_zh: 父系與場地的血統交互，捕捉如 Galileo 後代偏擅草地的傾向，以父系傳遞的場地適性作排位線索。血統對草地與全天候跑道的適應確有遺傳信號，理論上有助預測新馬或資料少的馬匹。惟此特徵須完整父系×場地資料庫，現階段在 HK 管線中尚未接通（_nan_stub），列於目錄以備完整。
H139.description_en: A sire×surface pedigree interaction capturing tendencies like Galileo's progeny preferring turf, using inherited surface aptitude as a ranking clue. Pedigree does carry a genuine genetic signal for turf versus all-weather, useful in principle for lightly-raced or first-time runners. It needs a full sire×surface reference base not yet wired into the HK pipeline (a NaN stub), so it is listed for completeness.

H140.description_zh: 父系與距離的血統交互，以父系傳遞的程途傾向（部分已透過 Dosage 概念編碼）作為距離適性的線索。速度型與耐力型父系的後代在最佳程途上差異明顯，對缺乏實戰距離記錄的馬匹尤具參考。惟此特徵須完整父系資料庫支援，現階段在 HK 管線中尚未接通（_nan_stub），列於目錄以備完整。
H140.description_en: A sire×distance pedigree interaction using a sire's transmitted trip bias — partly encoded via the Dosage concept — as a clue to distance aptitude. Progeny of speed versus stamina sires differ markedly in their best trip, which is especially informative for horses with little proven distance form. It requires a full sire reference base not yet wired into the HK pipeline (a NaN stub) and is listed for completeness.

H141.description_zh: 季節與場地的交互，捕捉時令對地面狀態及有利跑法的影響，例如春雨期草地轉軟、後追馬更佔優。香港賽季橫跨乾濕兩季，雨季草地軟化會改變配速與走位優勢，分季建模能還原這類季節效應。屬交互特徵，須與當日天氣與場地軟硬一併解讀。
H141.description_en: A season×surface interaction capturing how time of year shifts going and the styles it favours — for instance turf softening in the spring rains, tilting races toward closers. Hong Kong's season spans dry and wet halves, and rain-softened turf changes pace and positioning edges, so modelling by season recovers these effects. It is an interaction term, best read with same-day weather and going.

H142.description_zh: 配速與班次的交互，反映高班賽事領放競爭更兇、配速更熾熱，從而放大後追馬的加成。班次越高，前領馬實力相當、互不相讓，前段崩盤令後上者得益更大。此特徵須與跑法（後追／領放）及配速壓力共同作用，方能準確映射到位次。
H142.description_en: A pace×class interaction reflecting that higher-grade races feature fiercer competition for the lead and a hotter tempo, amplifying the bonus to closers. The better the class, the more evenly matched the front-runners refuse to yield, collapsing the early pace and rewarding off-the-pace types more. It only maps cleanly to finishing position in concert with running style and pace pressure.

H143.description_zh: 用藥與場地的交互（如 Lasix × 泥地），在美國賽事中為強信號，但香港不准賽日用藥，故此特徵在 HK 恆為 NaN。它本可捕捉特定藥物在某地面下的表現效應，惟與本地規例不相容。列於目錄純為與美式特徵對齊及完整性，現階段不參與計算（_nan_stub）。
H143.description_en: A medication×surface interaction (e.g. Lasix × dirt) that is a strong signal in US racing, but Hong Kong bans race-day medication, so this feature is always NaN for HK. It would capture how a given drug performs on a particular surface, yet it is incompatible with local rules. It sits in the catalogue purely for alignment with US-style features and completeness, and does not compute here (a NaN stub).

H144.description_zh: 馬齡與距離的交互，量度不同年齡馬匹在各程途的表現差異。此槽與類別 3 的 H033 重複，僅作交互框架的佔位／鏡像保留，以維持特徵矩陣結構完整；實際信號請參照 H033。年輕馬與成熟馬的最佳程途確有系統性差異，但此處不另計獨立信號。
H144.description_en: An age×distance interaction measuring how horses of different ages perform across trips. This slot mirrors H033 in Category 3 and is kept only as a placeholder to preserve the interaction matrix's structure — refer to H033 for the live signal. Young and mature horses do differ systematically in their best trip, but no separate signal is computed here.

H145.description_zh: 天氣與場地的交互，捕捉降雨令草地由好轉軟的動態過程，據以調整配速與跑法優勢。雨後草地漸軟會減慢時間、利於體能型與後追馬，並改變內外欄走位優劣。屬交互特徵，須以賽前最新天氣與場地評級為輸入，與季節×場地（H141）互補解讀。
H145.description_en: A weather×surface interaction capturing how rainfall progressively softens turf from good to yielding, used to adjust pace and style edges. Softening ground after rain slows times, favours stamina and closing types, and shifts the inside-versus-outside draw advantage. It is an interaction term driven by the latest pre-race weather and going rating, complementing season×surface (H141).

H146.description_zh: 賽事編號與場地（草地/泥地）的交互項：把當日賽程序號乘以場地類別，捕捉草地賽道在後段賽事被反覆踐踏而出現的耗損與走線變化。後段草地常因內欄草皮受損而使有利跑位由內移外，故同一閘位在頭場與尾場的價值並不相同；泥地受踐踏影響較小，交互值因而較平。
H146.description_en: An interaction of the race number on the card with the surface (turf vs dirt), capturing how a turf course wears as the meeting progresses and the early races chew up the rail. By late-card on turf the freshest, fastest ground often migrates off the fence, so the same draw is worth less than it was in race one; on the all-weather dirt the effect is muted, leaving the interaction flatter. It is a context modifier rather than a horse-level rating, sharpening draw and running-style signals for the back end of a card.

H147.description_zh: Harville top-2 機率：由各馬的單贏機率，透過 Harville (1973) 閉式鏈式公式 P(j第二|i勝)=p_j/(1−p_i) 推算出任一「冠亞」組合機率，是連贏（quinella）定價的業界標準。它把單贏勝率「滾」成位置組合機率，但已知會高估熱門馬在亞、季位置的機會，Henery 1981 與 Plackett-Luce 屬公認的精細化版本。注意：HK 資料尚未接駁此計算，列於目錄以求完整。
H147.description_en: Harville top-2 probability: the closed-form Harville (1973) chain rule P(j second | i wins) = p_j/(1 − p_i) rolls each horse's win probability up into the chance of any given 1-2 finishing combination, the textbook estimator behind quinella pricing. It carries real signal because exotic-pool structure reflects collective beliefs about who runs second, but it is known to over-rate favourites in the place positions, which Henery 1981 and Plackett-Luce correct with running-time models. Listed for completeness — the HK data source for this is not currently wired up.
H147.notes_zh:
技術層面：P(j 第二 | i 勝) = p_j / (1 - p_i)。對 favourite 在 2nd/3rd 有偏差 (高估)，Henery 1981 [B9] 與 Plackett-Luce 是公認的精細化版本。
通俗層面：知道每匹馬奪冠機率後，怎麼推算「1+2 連贏」機率？Harville 公式是最簡單的方法，業界標準。
H147.notes_en:
Technical: P(j second | i wins) = p_j / (1 − p_i). Known to over-rate favourites in second/third position; Henery 1981 [B9] and Plackett-Luce refine this with running-time models.
Layman: given each horse's win chance, how likely is the 1-2 combination? The Harville formula is the textbook way to roll win probabilities up into exotic-bet prices.

H148.description_zh: Harville top-3 機率：把同一鏈式法則延伸至「冠亞季」P(i,j,k)=p_i×p_j/(1−p_i)×p_k/(1−p_i−p_j)，作為三重彩與位置連贏定價基礎。比連贏多算一個位置便急劇變複雜——12 匹馬約有 1320 種排序，實務上多以 Monte Carlo 或 listwise 近似求解而非逐一枚舉。承襲 Harville 對熱門的偏差；HK 資料尚未接駁，僅列於目錄以求完整。
H148.description_en: Harville top-3 probability: the same chain rule extended to the 1-2-3 ordering, P(i,j,k) = p_i × p_j/(1−p_i) × p_k/(1−p_i−p_j), underpinning trifecta and place-quinella pricing. Adding a third place explodes the combinatorics — roughly 1320 orderings in a 12-horse field — so it is usually approximated by Monte-Carlo or listwise methods rather than enumerated exhaustively. It inherits Harville's favourite bias from H147 and, like it, is in the catalogue for completeness but not currently computed for HK data.
H148.notes_zh:
技術層面：P(i, j, k) = p_i × p_j/(1-p_i) × p_k/(1-p_i-p_j)。組合爆量：n=12 時 ≈ 1320 組，需 Monte Carlo 或 listwise 近似快速求解 [B9][B31]。
通俗層面：再加一個位置（第三名）就更複雜。三重彩有上千種組合，要全算很慢，所以實務上會用簡化的數學方法。
H148.notes_en:
Technical: P(i, j, k) = p_i × p_j/(1-p_i) × p_k/(1-p_i-p_j). The combinatorial explosion (≈ 1320 orderings for a 12-horse field) typically requires Monte-Carlo or listwise approximations [B9][B31].
Layman: same idea as the 1-2 but extended to picking three. Far more combinations, so we usually approximate rather than enumerate every possibility.

H149.description_zh: Henery 修正：對 Harville 公式的精細化，假設各馬跑時服從指數分佈，再由此推導較合理的亞、季位置機率，特別針對 Harville 高估熱門、低估冷門的偏差作出校正。它讓 longshot 在前二、前三位置的機率回到較貼近實況的水平，是連贏與三重彩定價更準確的版本。HK 資料尚未接駁此計算，列於目錄以求完整。
H149.description_en: Henery refinement: an upgrade to the Harville estimator that models each horse's running time as an exponential random variable, then derives the second- and third-place probabilities from those latent times rather than a naive chain rule. This directly counters Harville's habit of over-rating favourites and under-rating longshots in the place positions, giving sharper exotic prices for quinella and trifecta markets. It is catalogued for completeness but currently inactive, as the HK data wiring for it is not in place.

H150.description_zh: Plackett-Luce 似然：一個 listwise 排序模型，把整個完賽次序視為依各馬「強度」參數逐位抽出的機率連乘，給出整條排名的聯合似然。它是學習排序（LtR）的自然訓練目標，能一次過建模冠亞季乃至全場名次，比逐對比較更貼合賽馬「排名」本質。可同時提供位置機率供彩池定價；HK 此計算尚未接駁，列於目錄以求完整。
H150.description_en: Plackett-Luce likelihood: a listwise ranking model that treats the full finishing order as a sequence of choices, each drawn in proportion to a horse's latent strength parameter, yielding a joint likelihood over the entire placing. It is the natural training objective for a learning-to-rank model because it scores the whole order at once rather than pairwise, matching how racing is actually settled. It also emits coherent place probabilities for exotic pricing, but is catalogued for completeness and not currently wired up for HK data.

H151.description_zh: 折扣式 Harville：在標準 Harville 機率上，對高賠率冷門在亞、季位置的機率施以折扣，源自 PaceAdvantage 社群的實證調整。它修補了純 Harville 系統性高估 longshot 進佔位置的傾向，使連贏、三重彩定價更貼近實際派彩分佈，屬簡便而有效的經驗修正。與 Henery 動機相近但做法更直接；HK 資料尚未接駁，列於目錄以求完整。
H151.description_en: Discounted Harville: the standard Harville probabilities with an empirical haircut applied to longshots in the place positions, a fix popularised by the PaceAdvantage community. It addresses the well-known tendency of plain Harville to over-state a big-priced horse's chance of running second or third, pulling exotic prices back toward realised payout distributions. It shares Henery's motivation but is cruder and more practical, and it is catalogued for completeness rather than computed, since the HK data source is not wired up.

H152.description_zh: 連贏跑法互補性：評估一對馬的跑法是否互補，從而提升其同登前列的連贏機會。例如一前領、一後追的組合，因不會在同一段賽程互相消耗，反而較易雙雙跑入冠亞位；反之兩匹爭先馬可能自相殘殺。此特徵把賽程動態（pace dynamics）轉化為配對層面的訊號，補充純機率式 Harville 對跑法盲視的不足。
H152.description_en: Quinella style complementarity: a pairwise measure of whether two horses' running styles fit together well enough to fill the first two places. A natural front-runner paired with a strong closer rarely fights the same part of the race and so is more likely to finish 1-2, whereas two speed horses may cut each other's throats up front. It injects pace dynamics into the combination signal, complementing the purely probabilistic Harville family which is blind to how the race actually unfolds.

H153.description_zh: 連贏組合競爭強度：衡量某一對馬在場中所面對的對手實力，例如場內具威脅的強檔（強練馬師/騎師組合或高分馬）數目。對手越強，該配對佔據冠亞位的難度越高，連贏機率須相應下調。此欄把「場地深度」帶入配對層面，使連贏定價不只看自身機率，也計入整體競爭環境。
H153.description_en: Quinella field strength: a gauge of how much competition a given pair faces, such as the count of genuinely threatening rivals — strong jockey/trainer combinations or high-rated horses — also vying for the top two slots. The deeper and stronger the field, the harder it is for any specific pair to lock up the 1-2, so their quinella probability should be discounted accordingly. It folds field depth into the combination view, ensuring exotic prices reflect the surrounding competition and not just the pair's own merit.

H154.description_zh: 三甲組合機率向量：把所有可能的「冠亞季」有序組合的機率打包成一個向量，供下游三重彩定價與排序模型直接取用。它將 Harville/Plackett-Luce 等位置機率以結構化形式輸出，避免重複計算上千種排序，是彩池端的高效介面。屬衍生彙整特徵；HK 此計算尚未接駁，列於目錄以求完整。
H154.description_en: Trifecta probability vector: a packaged vector of the ordered 1-2-3 probabilities across every plausible top-three permutation, exposed so downstream trifecta pricing and ranking can consume them directly. It is the structured output form of the Harville/Plackett-Luce place probabilities, sparing the system from recomputing the thousand-plus orderings each time. As a derived aggregation feature it is listed for completeness but not currently wired up for HK data.

H155.description_zh: 相鄰閘干擾相關性：估算相鄰閘位馬匹在起步與首段彎位互相干擾的機率，並把這種相關性納入名次預測。相鄰閘的馬出閘後常爭奪同一條走線，易發生碰撞、夾擊或被迫收慢，名次因而出現非獨立的關聯。此欄補捉純單馬特徵無法表達的「鄰位效應」，對窄路彎多的場地（如快活谷）尤其重要。
H155.description_en: Adjacent-draw interference correlation: an estimate of the probability that horses in neighbouring gates bump or check each other at the jump and into the first turn, and of how that links their outcomes. Runners drawn side by side often contest the same line off the gate, so their finishing positions are not independent — one's trouble can be the other's gift. It captures a neighbour effect that single-horse features miss, and matters most on tight, turning tracks like Happy Valley.

H156.description_zh: 開盤賠率：當日該馬首個公布的彩池賠率快照。與收市 SP 對比，可量度資金流向——縮短為 steamer、拉長為 drift，是判斷「內幕資金」的起點。由於 HK 為純彩池制，開盤由開閘前少量資金定價，對其後變動極為敏感；opening 與 closing 差距達三成以上常被視為 steamer 訊號。
H156.description_en: Opening odds — the first published tote price of the day for a horse. Set against the closing price, it reveals which way money has flowed: a shortening price is a steamer, a lengthening one a drifter, and the gap is the starting point for spotting informed money. Because HK runs pure pari-mutuel pools, the opening is fixed by sparse early money and is highly sensitive to later flow, so an opening-to-close move of 30% or more is a recognised steamer signal worth respecting.
H156.notes_zh:
技術層面：opening — closing 差距 ≥ 30% 視為 steamer 訊號。HK 純 pari-mutuel 池，opening 由開閘前小量資金決定，敏感於後續變動。
通俗層面：早上開盤的賠率，等比賽前的賠率，看資金有沒有湧入。若有人偷偷大買，賠率會明顯縮短，這通常是「內幕資金」的訊號。
H156.notes_en:
Technical: opening-to-closing drift of 30% or more is a recognised 'steamer' signal of late professional money. Because HK runs pure pari-mutuel pools, the opening price is set by sparse early money and is very sensitive to subsequent flow.
Layman: the price first thing in the morning versus the price at off-time. If a horse's price drops sharply, big money has piled in — usually informed money worth respecting.

H157.description_zh: 收市賠率（HK 起跑賠率/SP）：開閘一刻最後一個彩池快照，反映市場最完整的資訊，也是 CLV 計算的基準價。1/收市賠率即市場隱含勝率（含 HK 約 17.5% 抽水），是 Benter 兩段式 logit 中 π_i 的核心輸入；缺此值模型等同資訊匱乏。越接近開賽，賠率越貼近真實勝率，是衡量自身有否 edge 的關鍵尺。
H157.description_en: Closing odds (HK starting price) — the final tote snapshot as the gates open, reflecting the market's fullest information and serving as the reference price for CLV. Its reciprocal is the market-implied win probability (carrying HK's ~17.5% takeout) and supplies the π_i term in Benter's two-stage logit; without it the blended model is information-starved. The closer to off-time, the sharper the price, which is why it is the yardstick professionals use to judge whether they have beaten the market.
H157.notes_zh:
技術層面：1/closing_odds = market implied prob (含 ~17.5% takeout)。Benter 1994 [B1] stage-2 logit 的 π_i 核心輸入；無此值則模型 information-starved。
通俗層面：開閘那一刻的賠率，是最多人投注的綜合結果。市場越接近開賽，賠率就越「準」，這也是專家評估自己有沒有 edge 的關鍵基準。
H157.notes_en:
Technical: 1 / closing_odds is the market-implied win probability (carrying ~17.5% takeout in HK). This is the π_i term in Benter 1994's stage-2 logit [B1] — without it, the blended model is information-starved.
Layman: the price right before the gates open is the crowd's combined wisdom. It's the standard against which professional bettors measure whether they've 'beaten the market' on each bet.

H158.description_zh: 賠率走勢百分比：(收市−開盤)/開盤。負值為 steamer（賠率縮短、資金湧入），正值為 drift（賠率拉長、資金撤離），晚段大幅移動尤其是 sharp money 訊號。縮短常代表大型專業資金或 syndicate 入場，拉長多因內行棄注或公眾熱潮退卻。方向本身即攜帶資訊，比靜態賠率更能反映場內動態。
H158.description_en: Odds drift percentage: (close − open) / open. Negative means a steamer — the price shortened as money arrived; positive means drift — the price lengthened as money left, and large late moves are the strongest sharp-money tells. A steamer of −30% or more often marks syndicate or large-stake money coming in late, while drift typically reflects professionals abandoning the horse or the public's hype fading. The direction of the move itself carries signal beyond the static price level.
H158.notes_zh:
技術層面：steamer ≥ -30% 通常代表大型專業資金或 syndicate 入場。drift 多由 informed bettors 棄注，或公眾從 hype 退潮。
通俗層面：賠率有沒有動?  動的方向告訴你資金在做什麼。突然縮短表示有人押下重注，相反如果拉長則表示市場對牠失去信心。
H158.notes_en:
Technical: a steamer ≤ −30% commonly marks syndicate or large-stake money arriving late. Drift the other way often means professional bettors abandoned the horse or the public's earlier hype faded.
Layman: did the price move? Which direction? A sudden shortening means heavy money came in; a lengthening means people lost interest. Both carry information.

H159.description_zh: 隱含概率：1/賠率，未扣除抽水的原始市場勝率估計。它把賠率直接翻譯成「市場認為牠贏的機會」，是把賠率訊號餵入模型的最基本形式，也是計算 overround、CLV 等衍生量的基礎磚塊。由於含約 17.5% 抽水，整場各馬之和會超過 100%，須經正規化才得到可比的真實機率。
H159.description_en: Implied probability: 1 / odds, the raw market estimate of a horse's win chance before takeout is stripped out. It translates the price straight into the crowd's stated probability and is the most basic way odds signal enters the model, as well as the building block for derived quantities like overround and CLV. Because it still embeds HK's ~17.5% takeout, the field's implied probabilities sum to more than 100% and must be normalised before they are comparable as true probabilities.

H160.description_zh: 公眾集中度：場中熱門前三匹合佔彩池的份額，量度市場資金有多集中或分散。份額高表示公眾意見一面倒、賽果被少數熱門主導；份額低則代表開放、難分難解的賽事，冷馬爆冷空間較大。此欄刻畫整場的「市場形狀」，可作為調整個別隱含機率與評估賽事可預測性的場級情境。
H160.description_en: Public concentration: the combined share of the win pool held by the top three favourites, measuring how tightly or loosely the market's money is bunched. A high share means lopsided public opinion and a race dominated by a few short-priced runners; a low share signals a wide-open, competitive heat where longshots have more room to upset. It describes the overall shape of the market and acts as race-level context for adjusting individual implied probabilities and gauging how predictable the event is.

H161.description_zh: 市場抽水率（Overround）：Σ(1/賠率)−1，即全場隱含機率之和超出 100% 的部分，直接反映彩池抽水。HK 純彩池抽水約 17.5%，故正常市場的 overround 約 0.175；池內結構正常時數值穩定，異常偏高（如 0.25+）則暗示池有偏差或存在大型錯價。把各馬隱含勝率相加、超出一成的便是「莊家利潤」，是正規化機率前必須剔除的部分。
H161.description_en: Overround: Σ(1 / odds) − 1, the amount by which the field's total implied probability exceeds 100%, a direct read on pool takeout. HK pari-mutuel takeout runs about 17.5%, so a healthy market sits near overround = 0.175 and stays stable when the pool is balanced; spikes above the norm (e.g. 0.25+) hint at a skewed pool or a sizeable mispricing. It is effectively the operator's margin baked into the prices and must be removed before implied probabilities can be normalised into true win chances.
H161.notes_zh:
技術層面：overround = takeout 率的市場直接反映。若市場結構正常，overround 穩定；異常高 (e.g. 0.25+) 表示池內有偏差或大型 mispricing。
通俗層面：把所有馬的隱含勝率加起來，超過 100% 的部分就是「莊家利潤」。HK 約 17.5% 是常態。
H161.notes_en:
Technical: overround equals the realised market take-out and stays stable when the pool is well-balanced. Spikes above the norm (e.g. 0.25+) usually mean a skewed pool or a large mispricing somewhere.
Layman: add up every horse's implied probability — the amount over 100% is the operator's margin. In HK that's about 17.5%, by design.

H162.description_zh: 投注交易所起跑價（Betfair SP）：全球公認最 sharp 的對賭交易所結算價，常作為衡量自身定價的黃金基準。然而 Betfair 在香港並無對應彩池，HKJC 為純彩池市場，故此特徵在 HK 場景下並不適用、目前停用。列於目錄僅為完整性參考；若有此資料，本可作為跨市場的 sharp benchmark 校驗 HK 收市價的效率。
H162.description_en: Betfair Starting Price — the settled price from the world's sharpest betting exchange, widely used as a gold-standard benchmark for one's own pricing. But Betfair operates no Hong Kong pool and HKJC is a pure pari-mutuel market, so this feature is out of scope for HK and currently inactive. It sits in the catalogue for completeness only; were the data available, it would offer a cross-market sharp benchmark against which to test the efficiency of the HK closing price.

H163.description_zh: 內部收市線值（Internal CLV）：押注時的隱含機率減去收市隱含機率，正值代表你拿到比最終市場更佳的價，是「模型是否真有 edge」最客觀的即時驗證。HK 無 Betfair BSP，故以最後一個 HKJC 彩池快照作 close 基準。專業 syndicate（Benter、Ranogajec）視長期 CLV 為正為勝利條件，無論單場輸贏；長線 CLV 為正即等同模型擁有真實優勢。
H163.description_en: Internal CLV (closing line value): implied probability at the moment you bet minus the implied probability at the close, where a positive value means you secured a better price than the market eventually settled on — the most objective real-time test that the model genuinely has edge. With no Betfair BSP for HK, the latest HKJC tote snapshot serves as the close benchmark. Professional syndicates (Benter, Ranogajec) treat positive long-run CLV as the true win condition regardless of any single race's result, since sustained positive CLV is equivalent to owning a real edge.
H163.notes_zh:
技術層面：HK 無 Betfair BSP，以 HKJC tote 為 close benchmark。專業 syndicate (Benter [B1]、Ranogajec) 視 CLV > 0 為勝利條件，無論單場輸贏。長期 CLV 為正 ↔ 模型有真實 edge。
通俗層面：你下注時的賠率比結束時更划算嗎？若是，無論這場輸贏，你長期都會贏錢。這是「贏家思維」的核心指標。
H163.notes_en:
Technical: with no Betfair BSP available for HK pools, we use the latest HKJC tote snapshot as the close. Professional syndicates (Benter [B1], Ranogajec) treat positive long-run CLV as proof of edge regardless of any single race's win/lose outcome.
Layman: was your price better than the final price? If yes consistently, you'll win money in the long run even if individual races go against you. This is the most honest yardstick a bettor can use.

H164.description_zh: 交易所深度：在每個價格檔位上可成交的 back/lay 掛盤量，反映市場流動性與大額資金能否從容進出。深度大代表價格可靠、不易被小注扭動；深度薄則賠率脆弱、易受操控。然而此資料源自 Betfair 交易所，香港並無對應彩池，故在 HK 場景下不適用、目前停用，列於目錄僅為完整性。
H164.description_en: Exchange depth: the volume of back and lay orders resting at each price tick, a read on liquidity and on how easily large money can move in or out. Deep books mean prices are robust and hard to shift with small stakes, while thin depth makes odds fragile and easily manipulated. This data comes from the Betfair exchange, which has no Hong Kong pool, so the feature is out of scope for HK and currently inactive, retained in the catalogue only for completeness.

H165.description_zh: 晚段資金移動（Late steam）：賽前最後 15-30 分鐘的賠率變動，是資訊質量最高的一段時間。越接近開閘，下注者掌握的資訊越完整（馬匹狀態、跑道、天氣），故此段的縮短或拉長最能反映 sharp money 的最終取態。晚段急縮往往預示專業資金看好，較開盤期的早段移動更具預測力。
H165.description_en: Late steam: the odds move in the final 15-30 minutes before the off, the window in which information quality is highest. The nearer to gate time, the more bettors know — fitness, going, weather — so a shortening or lengthening in this stretch best reflects where the sharp money finally lands. A sharp late tightening tends to foreshadow professional confidence and carries more signal than the noisier early moves around the opening price.

H166.description_zh: 多平台一致性：同一匹馬在多個莊家或彩池之間是否同步移動，作為過濾雜訊、確認真訊號的依據。若各平台價格不約而同地一齊縮短，遠比單一池的孤立移動更可能是有資訊的 sharp money；單池異動則可能只是局部資金或雜訊。此欄需跨平台賠率資料，HK 純彩池環境下尚未接駁，列於目錄以求完整。
H166.description_en: Multi-platform consistency: whether a horse's price moves in step across several bookmakers or pools, used to separate genuine signal from noise. When prices shorten together everywhere, the move is far more likely to be informed sharp money than an isolated shift in a single pool, which may be local money or noise. The feature needs cross-platform odds data that is not wired up in HK's single pari-mutuel environment, so it is listed for completeness but currently inactive.

H167.description_zh: 當日場地偏差：今日已跑賽事中，領跑馬或內閘勝出的比率減去長期均值後的殘差。正值代表「利領跑/內閘」的日子，負值代表「利後追」的日子。基準取全部歷史平均（如內閘勝率約 30%、領跑勝率約 35%），每日由 compute_track_bias 預計算入 track_bias_daily。看頭幾場勝者的跑法，便大致知道當天場地吃哪一套。
H167.description_en: Same-day track bias: the residual of today's front-runner or inner-draw winning share against the long-run baseline (about 30% inner, 35% front-runner). A positive value flags a leader-friendly day, a negative one a closer's day, and the bias is pre-computed each meeting into track_bias_daily by compute_track_bias. Reading the running styles of the first few winners tells you which pattern the track is rewarding, and that tendency usually persists through the rest of the card.
H167.notes_zh:
技術層面：基準值 = 全部歷史平均 (e.g. inner-draw winners ≈ 30%、front-runner winners ≈ 35%)。每日場地偏差透過 compute_track_bias 預計算入 track_bias_daily。
通俗層面：今天場地適合哪種跑法？看頭幾場的勝者就大致知道。如果三場頭都是內閘領跑馬，那今天「內閘領跑」就吃香。
H167.notes_en:
Technical: residual of today's front-runner / inner-draw winning share versus the long-run baseline (~30% inner, ~35% front-runner). Pre-computed daily into track_bias_daily by compute_track_bias.
Layman: what kind of horse is winning today? If the first three races all went to inner-draw front-runners, the same pattern is likely to keep playing through the card.

H168.description_zh: 標準時間殘差（Par-time residual）：把整場（或分段）跑時與該班次、該程的「標準時間」(par) 相比的差值，用以剝離當日場地快慢，還原馬匹的真實表現水平。跑得比 par 快多少，是衡量速度品質、跨場比較的常用基準。此計算需可靠的分段與 par-time 資料源，HK 尚未接駁，列於目錄以求完整。
H168.description_en: Par-time residual: the gap between a race's (or sectional's) clocking and the par time expected for that class and distance, used to strip out how fast or slow the surface ran on the day and recover a horse's true merit. How far under par a run was is a standard yardstick of speed quality and a basis for comparing performances across meetings. Computing it needs reliable sectional and par-time data not currently wired up for HK, so it is catalogued for completeness but inactive.

H169.description_zh: Rail 配置：賽事所用的內欄圍欄位置（rail position），與 H058 同源、在此重複併入以便上下文使用。圍欄外移會改變實際賽程長度與最佳走線，連帶影響閘位價值與領跑/後追的優劣，是解讀當日場地偏差不可或缺的背景。把它與場地偏差及閘位特徵聯合，方能準確判讀走位優劣。
H169.description_en: Rail position: the placement of the temporary running rail for the race, the same value as H058 and joined here for context. Moving the rail out changes the effective trip length and the best line to run, which in turn shifts draw values and the balance between leaders and closers, making it essential background for reading the day's track bias. It is most useful joined with the bias and draw features so running-position advantages can be judged correctly.

H170.description_zh: 賽前灌溉量（毫米）：賽事前場方對草地灌水的記錄，直接影響草地軟硬與場地快慢。灌水越多，地面越「黏」、越偏軟身，利後追與重力型馬而不利純爭先快馬；偏乾則跑時快、利領前。此欄把場地準備的人為因素量化，與草長、灌溉等共同界定當日的真實 going。
H170.description_en: Pre-race watering (cm): the groundstaff's record of how much water was applied to the turf, a direct driver of how soft or firm the surface plays and how fast it runs. More water makes the ground holding and softer, favouring closers and grinders over pure speed, while drier going clocks faster and helps front-runners. It quantifies the human side of track preparation and, alongside grass length, helps pin down the true going for the day.

H171.description_zh: 草長（毫米）：賽前修剪草坪的記錄，反映草皮長短對阻力與快慢的影響。草留得越長，地面阻力越大、跑時越慢，偏向耐力與後追型；剪得越短則跑面越快、利搶先。它與灌溉量一同界定當日草地的真實 going，是把「場地準備」轉成可量化特徵的一環。
H171.description_en: Grass length (cm): the record of how the turf was cut before racing, reflecting how the sward's length affects resistance and speed. Longer grass means more drag and slower times, tilting the race toward stamina and closers, whereas a tight cut produces a faster surface that suits front-runners. Together with watering it defines the true going for the day, turning track preparation into a quantifiable feature.

H172.description_zh: 內欄殘差：今日內閘（低號閘位）勝出/入位的比率相對長期均值的殘差，專門量度當天內欄走線的優劣。正值代表今日內閘特別吃香、貼欄省程的馬受惠；負值則代表內欄受損或不利，外閘反而有利。它與 H167 互補，把場地偏差細分到閘位維度，配合圍欄位置一同解讀走位價值。
H172.description_en: Inner-draw residual: the residual of today's inner (low-numbered) gate winning or placing share against its long-run average, isolating how the inside running line is playing on the day. A positive value means the rail is golden and ground-saving horses benefit, while a negative one signals a chewed-up or disadvantaged inside where wider draws fare better. It complements H167 by breaking track bias down to the draw dimension and is best read together with the rail position to value running positions.

H173.description_zh: 風向變化：比較早、午、晚各時段的風向，捕捉逆風對領跑馬的影響。直路若轉為迎面逆風，領前馬須獨自頂風耗能、易在最後被後追馬反超；順風或側風則影響較小。日夜場與不同程的賽事所受影響各異，此欄把氣象動態轉成對跑法（特別是領跑）的情境修正。
H173.description_en: Wind direction shift: a comparison of wind direction across the morning, afternoon and evening sessions, capturing how a headwind hurts front-runners. When the straight turns into a head breeze, leaders have to spend energy fighting the wind alone and are more easily run down late, whereas a tailwind or crosswind matters far less. Its impact varies by session and trip, and the feature turns this weather dynamic into a context adjustment for running style, especially for on-pace types.

H174.description_zh: 當日後追馬加成：1 − 領跑偏差（front_runner_residual），是 H167 的補集。當天領跑馬表現越差、領前殘差越低，此值越高，自動把分數加給「等到最後才衝」的後追型馬。它與 H167 配對使用，把同一場地動態的另一面——後追是否吃香——明確量化，避免遺漏 closer 在不利領前日子的上行空間。
H174.description_en: Same-day closer boost: 1 − front-runner residual, the complement of H167. The worse the leaders are going today and the lower the front-runner residual, the higher this term climbs, automatically crediting horses that come from off the pace. Paired with H167, it makes the flip side of the same track dynamic explicit, ensuring closers get their due uplift on days when the speed cannot hold and front-running is not paying.
H174.notes_zh:
技術層面：closer_boost = 1 − front_runner_residual。是 H167 的補集，用於 closer-style horses 的 same-day uplift。
通俗層面：如果領跑馬今天表現差，後追馬就有機會。這個欄位就是專門給「等下班才衝」的馬的加分。
H174.notes_en:
Technical: closer_boost = 1 − front-runner residual. Complement to H167 — when leaders are underperforming today, this term automatically lifts closer-style runners.
Layman: if the front-runners can't win today, the back-runners can. This score gives them the credit they're due.
